    oTxtEmpireAttackRaider_bt_hullReaper1

    You prime your hull reaper system and engage the Imperial aggressor. Your vessel's hull is regenerated as the Imperial ship crumbles beneath the assault.

    • +5 hull HP
    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireAttackRaider_bt_hullReaper2

      The raider vessel cheers at your intervention. They begin salvaging the Imperial vessel, but offer you a portion of the spoils.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue

EmpireAttackRaider_bt

→ oTxtEmpireAttackRaider_bt_hullReaper1

EmpireAttackTechnocult

oTxtEmpireAttackTechnocult_intro

You encounter a technocult vessel under attack by an Imperial patrol ship.

  1. Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtEmpireAttackTechnocult_attack

    You move to engage the Imperial patrol ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtEmpireAttackTechnocult_winA

      The machine priests transfer to you some advanced technology in acknowledgement of your assistance.

      • Random ship module
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireAttackTechnocult_winB

      The technocult vessel is nowhere to be found. They had escaped during your engagement with the Imperial ship.

      1. Continue
  2. Leave the technocultists to their fate
    oTxtEmpireAttackTechnocult_leave

    You leave the technocult starship to fend for themselves against the Imperial patrol ship.

    1. Continue
  3. (Hull Reaper) Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtEmpireAttackTechocult_bt_hullReaper1

    You prime your hull reaper system and engage the Imperial aggressor. Your vessel's hull is regenerated as the Imperial ship crumbles beneath the assault.

    • +5 hull HP
    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireAttackTechocult_bt_hullReaper2

      No longer forced to defend themselves, the machine priests silently move on. You salvage the remnants of the destroyed Imperial ship and likewise depart.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue

EmpireAttackTechocult_bt

→ oTxtEmpireAttackTechocult_bt_hullReaper1

EmpireAttackWarCult

oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_intro

You encounter a war cult vessel being pursued by an Imperial patrol ship.

  1. Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_attack

    You prime your weapons and move to intercept the Imperial ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_winA

      The cultists are displeased at your intervention. They dispatch an assault sled and board you with one of their champions.

      • 1 Berserker or Conqueror boarder
      1. Continue
      After the boarders are defeated:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_winA1

        With their champion slain, the Kromic cultists withdraw.

        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_winA2

        The Kromic cultists withdrew following the death of their champion. You salvage what is left of the champion's mangled equipment.

        • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_winB

      The cultists gruffly acknowledge your aid. They transfer you a quantity of munitions before jumping out.

      • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
      1. Continue
  2. Leave the war cultists to their fate
    oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_leave

    It is not worth risking your ship to save the cultists. You proceed onwards.

    1. Continue
  3. (Hull Reaper) Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper1

    You prime your hull reaper system and engage the Imperial aggressor. Your vessel's hull is regenerated as the Imperial ship crumbles beneath the assault.

    • +5 hull HP
    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper2

      The war cultists are angered by your intervention. They turn and challenge your vessel to combat in place of their late Imperial opponents.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
      After the fight:
      oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper_win

      You salvage the remains of both vessels before moving on.

      • Random large reward
      1. Continue

EmpireAttackWarCult_bt

→ oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper1

EmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper

→ oTxtEmpireAttackWarCult_bt_hullReaper_win

EmpireCasketShip

oTxtEmpireCasketShip_intro

You come across an ancient and elaborately-decorated Imperial starship drifting in space. It is a casket-ship, a burial custom particular to high-ranking nobles of the Empire.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (weighted):
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateI

      You recover a shield in pristine condition from within the casket-ship.

      • Random Imperial defensive item
      1. Continue
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateH

      You recover a set of intricately-wrought armor from within the casket-ship.

      • Siege Armor or Heavy Duraplate Armor or Tactical Armor or Duraplate Armor
      1. Continue
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateC

      You explore the casket-ship. You recover a psychogram from one of the vaults.

      • 60%: Random Imperial psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
      1. Continue
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateF

      You retrieve a number of ordnance warheads from the casket-ship's munitions bay.

      • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
      1. Continue
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateE

      You arrive at the central hall within the ship to find a large stone plinth. Upon it rests a flaming sword.

      • Hellfire Blade
      1. Continue
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateA

      You move in for a closer look. The casket-ship's drives suddenly light up and you realize you have awoken its automated defense systems.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateB

      You move in for a closer look. The casket-ship's drives suddenly light up and a decayed visage appears on your viewscreen. "Grraaappkk..."

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateG

      Your ship rocks from the impact of long-range weapon fire. An Imperial patrol ship is approaching you at high speed. "At last, your days defiling the resting places of our noble fathers are over."

      • −1 hull HP
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
    • 1/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateD

      The interior of the casket-ship was once laden with all sorts of valuables intended to aid the noble in death. You manage to find a few unpillaged cargo containers and return to your ship enriched.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    • 2/11
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateJ

      You investigate the ship and manage to secure some useful supplies. Unfortunately, your presence near the tomb triggers a strange phenomenon. A winged apparition suddenly materializes out of nowhere and chases you back to your ship. With nowhere else to go, you are forced to confront it.

      • Random moderate reward
      • 1 Redeemer boarder
      1. Continue
      After the boarders are defeated:
      oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateJ_win

      You recover a weapon from the remains of the winged apparition.

      • Random Imperial weapon
      1. Continue
  2. Leave
    oTxtEmpireCasketShip_leave

    You decide to leave the dead in peace and move on.

    1. Continue
  3. (Imperial Citizen) Retrieve the relic
    oTxtEmpireCasketShip_bt_empire

    Deep within the ship, you discover a small, vaulted chamber built around a large stone fountain. One of your crew peers deep into the rippling waters before reaching in, drawing forth an ancient blade.

    • Blessed Blade
    1. Continue

EmpireCasketShip_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCasketShip_bt_empire

EmpireCasketShip_investigateJ

→ oTxtEmpireCasketShip_investigateJ_win

EmpireCitadel

oTxtEmpireCitadel_intro

You come across a citadel of the Imperial cult. Several civilian transports pass through the citadel, each one depositing throngs of pilgrims and religious officials.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateA

      You watch as the subjects of the Empire pay their respects to the Immortal God-King. A novitiate approaches and asks if you would like to give alms.

      1. Give 5 scrap
        oTxtEmpireCitadel_donateA

        "Many blessings to you."

        • −5 ⬗ Scrap
        • +1 hull HP
        • Heal all crew by choose(10, 15, 20)%
        1. Continue
      2. Decline
        oTxtEmpireCitadel_declineA

        You decline.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateB

      You watch as the subjects of the Empire pay their respects to the Immortal God-King. A novitiate approaches and asks if you would like to give alms.

      1. Give 10 scrap
        oTxtEmpireCitadel_donateB

        "Many blessings to you."

        • −10 ⬗ Scrap
        • +3 hull HP
        • Heal all crew by 50%
        1. Continue
      2. Decline
        → oTxtEmpireCitadel_declineA
    • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateC

      You watch as the subjects of the Empire pay their respects to the Immortal God-King. A novitiate approaches and asks if you would like to give alms.

      1. Give 15 scrap
        oTxtEmpireCitadel_donateC

        "Many blessings to you."

        • −15 ⬗ Scrap
        • +5 hull HP
        • Heal all crew by 100%
        1. Continue
      2. Decline
        → oTxtEmpireCitadel_declineA
    • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD

      You enter the citadel and overhear two men having a dispute. One of the men begins shouting. The Imperial arbitrators see this and immediately arrest the man. A few onlookers become angry at this and more people begin shouting.

      1. Continue
        oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD2

        In moments, the entire scene descends into chaos. Arbitrators stream into the room with shock-batons and begin forcefully subduing the rabblerousers.

        1. Continue
          Random outcome (1/3 each):
          • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD_out1

            You take a few blows to the head on your way out.

            • Commander damaged (30%)
            1. Continue
          • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD_out3

            You retreat back to your ship. On your way back, you pick up a piece of equipment that must have been dropped by the arbitrators before the fight broke out.

            • 60%: Random Imperial equipment / 40%: Random equipment item
            1. Continue
          • oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD_out2

            You make a hasty retreat. Back at your ship, you are greeted by a disgruntled Imperial subject. After expressing their dissatisfaction with the current state of affairs, you decide to tell them of your journey. They are sympathetic to your story and offer to join your crew.

            • Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, Imperial Marshal, Imperial Scribe, or Imperial Acolyte
            1. Continue
  2. Move on
    oTxtEmpireCitadel_leave

    You move on.

    1. Continue
  3. (Imperial Citizen) Seek blessings within
    oTxtEmpireCitadel_bt_empire

    You decide to disembark and mingle amongst the pilgrims. One of your crew members, long steeped in the Imperial traditions, instructs you on the rites of the faithful. A few of the pilgrims are taken by your piety. Some offer supplies, and another offers to join your journey. You depart enriched.

    • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Imperial Recruit or Imperial Scribe
    • Heal all crew by 100%
    1. Continue
oTxtEmpireCitadel_declineB Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You decline.

  1. Continue
oTxtEmpireCitadel_declineC Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You decline.

  1. Continue

EmpireCitadelFortress

oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_intro

Your astrocharts indicate the presence of an Imperial citadel-fortress in this system.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/5 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateC

      It appears this citadel-fortress was destroyed in an attack. You manage to recover some material from the wreckage.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateB

      It looks like this citadel-fortress was abandoned some time ago. You search the structure but find nothing of value.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateD

      It appears this citadel-fortress was destroyed in an attack by some unknown assailant. You manage to recover an unusual item from the wreckage.

      • Random cult equipment
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateA

      The confessors stationed at this citadel-fortress are highly suspicious of outsiders. They immediately deploy a warship in response to your presence.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateA_win

      You decide to get out of there before anyone else arrives.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateE

      You enter the citadel-fortress to see thousands of pilgrims gathered in the main hall. A monk approaches you and asks if you wish to make a donation.

      • −10 ⬗ Scrap
      1. Give 10 scrap
        oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_donateE

        "Many blessings to you."

        • Heal all crew by choose(10, 15, 20)%
        1. Continue
      2. Decline
        oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_declineE

        You decline.

        1. Continue
  2. Ignore it
    oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_leave

    You decide to ignore it and press on with your journey.

    1. Continue
  3. (Imperial Citizen) Seek blessings within
    oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_bt_empire

    The inner sanctum of the citadel has not been maintained for generations. In the chokingly still air, an altar lies ruined beneath the silent gaze of crouching gargoyles and winged creatures.

    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_bt_empire1

      Enlisting the aid of an Imperial-trained crewmember, you renew the altar. As you turn to leave, you hear a sharp noise. One of the weapons affixed to the sculptures above had fallen, planting itself upon the altar.

      • Zenith Blade or Blessed Blade or Cult Blade or Power Sword or Power Sword or Power Sword or Power Sword or Power Sword or Power Sword or Power Sword
      • Heal all crew by 100%
      1. Continue

EmpireCitadelFortress_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_bt_empire

EmpireCitadelFortress_investigateA

→ oTxtEmpireCitadelFortress_investigateA_win

EmpireCitadel_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCitadel_bt_empire

EmpireCitadel_investigateD

→ oTxtEmpireCitadel_investigateD_out1

EmpireCleansingColonies

oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_intro

An Imperial invasion fleet is visible in the distance. They appear to be burning down space colonies in this system. "Attention, colonies of the Empire. Due to your carelessness, an evil taint has been allowed to spread amongst you. Let these cleansing flames be a lesson to us all."

  1. Attempt to stop them
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_attemptStopB

      You approach the Imperials. In an instant, a squadron of interceptors locks on to you and begins firing. Their concentrated firepower soon forces you to turn back.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_attemptStopA

      You head towards the nearest colony. The screams of the dying can be heard over the comms as you approach. You target lock the Imperial warship besieging the helpless structure.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/4 each):
      • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight1

        You manage to save the colony from the Imperial attackers. The survivors shower you with praise, but eventually the mood turns grim when they realize just how much they have lost.

        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight2

        You successfully save the colony from the Imperials. One of their leaders congratulates you on a job well done, then presents you with a gift. "You have been chosen by the lords of the dark, the true gods of reality. I have seen it. We have all seen it."

        • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight3

        No other Imperial ships threaten this colony. The colony's surviving citizens chant in unholy unison as their leader bestows you with a sorcerous gift.

        • 60%: Random cult psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight4

        You succeed in saving the colony from the Imperial attackers. Unfortunately, dozens of neighboring colonies were lost as the Imperial fleet swept through the system. One of the survivors requests to join your crew, determined to take revenge against the Empire.

        • Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, Imperial Marshal, Imperial Scribe, or Imperial Acolyte or Raider crew
        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_attemptStopD

      You open fire at one of the Imperial ships attacking a space colony. As you do so, arcs of infernal lightning suddenly shoot out from the colony, striking both your ship and the Imperial ship. Throngs of otherworldly entities crawl out from the points of impact. You hear the Imperial commander over the open channel. "These blasphemers, they summon unholy beasts to their aid!"

      • 2–3 Demonic Crew boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/4 each):
      • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight1
      • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight2
      • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight3
      • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight4
    • oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_attemptStopC

      You move in to attack the nearest Imperial ship. Perhaps you can save just one of these colonies...

      1. Continue
        oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_attemptStopC2

        Suddenly a miasma of foul energy surges forth from one of the space colonies, blanketing the surrounding region. Both you and the Imperial ship are caught in the wave. You hear the Imperial commander curse over the open channel. "These miscreants, they wield the foulest of sorceries! Steel yourselves, my brethren!"

        • 4–8 poison clouds spawned
        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Empire ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        Random outcome (1/4 each):
        • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight1
        • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight2
        • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight3
        • → oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_afterFight4
  2. Stay hidden
    oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_stayHidden

    You decide to stay hidden.

    1. Continue
  3. (Imperial Citizen) Assist in the purge
    oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_bt_empire

    An Imperial-trained crew member helps modulate the comms to contact the invasion fleet. The Imperial commodore supposes you to be a commissioned privateer, and permits you to assist in the cleansing action.

    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_bt_empire1

      By the time you are able to inspect the interior of the colonies, they are little more than smoldering husks. You recover a few objects that miraculously survived the searing flames before moving on.

      • Random equipment item
      1. Continue

EmpireCleansingColonies_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCleansingColonies_bt_empire

EmpireCultAftermath

oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_intro

You arrive to see a devastated planet in front of you. An Imperial flotilla is holding station in orbit, high over the smoking ruins of the surface colonies.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateB

      The Imperials warn you to halt your approach. One of them is particularly eager to enforce their policy and begins attacking you.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateB_win1

        The other Imperial ships converge upon you to avenge their fallen comrades. They begin firing upon you. You disengage, having taken some minor hits to your hull.

        • −1 hull HP
        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateB_win2

        The other Imperial ships turn to angle their guns at you, but rigidly hold their positions. You disengage before they receive any orders to pursue.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateA

      A small cultist swarm emerges from subspace to harass the Imperial flotilla. One of them peels off towards you, evidently taking you for an Imperial.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
    • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC

      You notice a field of wreckage from a recent battle.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/7 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_2

          You search through one of the wrecks and recover some supplies.

          • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2

              Several Imperial vessels have noticed your activity. They demand you leave the area.

              1. Continue
            • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3

              A few Imperial vessels arrive and begin blasting the wrecks. There is little more for you to do here.

              1. Continue
            • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1

              The Imperial flotilla has become aware of your presence. They demand you turn over any artifacts found in the wreckage as they converge upon your position. You quickly retreat before you are overwhelmed.

              1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_3

          Searching through one of the Imperial wrecks yields some medical supplies.

          • 60%: Random Imperial psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
          • Med-Drone ×2
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_4

          A search through one of the cultist wrecks yields up an intact ship armament.

          • Random ship weapon
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_1

          You search through a wreck that was once a cultist vessel. You recover an unfamiliar artifact from one of the bodies.

          • 60%: Random cult equipment / 40%: Random equipment item
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_6

          You search through a cultist wreck but find nothing. The wreck must have been sanitized by the Imperials before you arrived.

          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_7

          You search through an Imperial wreck but find only meager scraps. The Imperials must have already finished their recovery operations before your arrival.

          • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
        • oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_5

          You are inspecting a cultist wreck when suddenly a psychic scream emanates from the wreckage. A subspace breach manifests aboard your ship, which promptly disgorges a number of otherworldly creatures.

          • 1–2 warp breaches spawned
          • 1–2 Demonic Crew boarders
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/3 each):
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_2
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_3
            • → oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2_1
  2. Leave
    oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_leave

    You leave the area and press on.

    1. Continue
  3. (Engine 3) Quickly loot and leave
    oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_bt_engine

    Your upgraded engines allow you to quickly enter a nearby wreck field. A few Imperial warships notice you and begin accelerating towards your position. Fortunately, they are unable to enter weapon range before you secure some valuables and escape.

    • Random moderate reward
    • Random cult equipment
    1. Continue

EmpireCultAftermath_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_bt_engine

EmpireCultAftermath_investigateB

→ oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateB_win1

EmpireCultAftermath_investigateC

→ oTxtEmpireCultAftermath_investigateC_1

EmpireCultAftermath_investigateC2

EmpireCultFleetBattle

oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_intro

You arrive in system and immediately find yourself in the middle of a massive battle between the Imperial armada and the warfleets of the Infernal Cults.

  1. Join the fight against the Empire
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireB

      You target lock one of the Imperial ships.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireE

      You scan for more targets.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Target one of the larger ships
        oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireLarge

        You move in to attack one of the larger Imperial warships.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Empire Large ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireLarge_win

        The Imperial fleet has lost most of its ships and is forced to back down. Several cult ships gather around the blasted remains of their Imperial enemies, apparently preparing to enact some sort of occult ritual. You take this opportunity to scavenge what you can from the surrounding wreckage.

        • Random small reward
        1. Continue
      2. Target one of the smaller ships
        oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireSmall

        You move in to attack one of the smaller Imperial vessels.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Empire ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireSmall_win1

          Several Imperial warships attack you in unison, forcing you to retreat. You take some minor damage as you escape.

          • 2–3 breaches spawned
          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireSmall_win2

          Despite your victories, the Imperial armada has managed to overwhelm the cultist fleet. With no one left on your side, you are forced to flee.

          • Crew recalled to ship
          1. Continue
      3. Flee the battle
        oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_leaveEmpireE1

        You decide to retreat. A few shots glance off your hull as you make your escape.

        • Crew recalled to ship
        • 2–3 breaches spawned
        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireA

      You lock on to the nearest Imperial warship. It looks like it has already taken a few hits.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight: → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireE
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireC

      You engage one of the Imperial vessels. Warning klaxons sound from your console, indicating the presence of intruders.

      • 1–2 Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, Imperial Marshal, Imperial Scribe, or Imperial Acolyte boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight: → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireE
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireD

      You open fire at the nearest Imperial warship. It seems to be under attack by infernal entities. Suddenly, several assault sleds blast out of the freighter's launch tubes and ram themselves into your hull.

      • 1–2 Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, Imperial Marshal, Imperial Scribe, or Imperial Acolyte boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight: → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireE
  2. Join the fight against the Infernal Cults
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultB

      You engage one of the accursed ships of the Infernal Cults.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterE

        Several cultist flagships suddenly begin attacking you in unison. You apply full power to engines and flee from the battle, but not before several assault pods smash into your hull.

        • Crew recalled to ship
        • 1–2 Weak cultist crew boarders
        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterF

        The cult fleet has been decimated. One of the Imperial ships contacts you and demands you present your starship ident codes. Unable to comply, you are forced to flee the scene.

        • Crew recalled to ship
        1. Continue
      • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterG

        The cult fleet has been annihilated. Unfortunately for the Imperials, their forces have been equally savaged. Few ships remain spaceworthy, making the battlezone ripe for plunder. You come away from the scene with a substantial amount of scavenged material.

        • Random large reward
        1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultA

      You lock onto a nearby cult warship. They seem to be busy repelling boarders.

      • 1–2 Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, Imperial Marshal, Imperial Scribe, or Imperial Acolyte boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterE
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterF
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterG
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultC

      One of the cult vessels takes several hits from a barrage of cannon fire. You move in to finish the job.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterE
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterF
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterG
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultD

      As you move in to engage the cultist fleet, one of their ships springs up on your flank and blankets your vessel in a wash of foul sorcery. Multiple subspace breaches appear across your ship. Strange, twisted entities begin spilling out from them.

      • 1–2 warp breaches spawned
      • 2–3 Demonic Crew boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterE
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterF
      • → oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightCultAfterG
  3. Flee
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_leave

      You avoid getting involved and manage to escape from the battle.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_leaveFight

      You set engines to full-burn. Unfortunately this sends you headlong into an Imperial warship. "The blasphemers in this sector will pay for their transgressions."

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_leaveFight_win

      You maneuver between several groups of embattled starships and manage to get away.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
  4. (Imperial Citizen) Request Imperial assistance
    oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_bt_empire

    One member of your crew is familiar with Imperial protocols and invokes a special request for noncombatant protection. A few of the smaller Imperial vessels dutifully respond and surround your vessel, expecting your vessel to be transporting critical supplies or an important noble. Pressured by their command to act in haste, they fail to ascertain your vessel's provenance and begin escorting you out of battle.

    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_bt_empire1

      One by one, your escort falls victim to long range fire from their cultist enemies. However, they persevere in their duty. The last of the corvettes sacrifices itself to defend your vessel at the edge of attack range. You salvage some materials from the tumbling wreckage before continuing on your way.

      • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireFlee Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You see an Imperial vessel suddenly change heading. It appears heavily damaged. You move in to intercept.

  1. Continue
Fight! vs Empire ship
After the rewards from the fight:
oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireFlee_win

You find yourself taking fire from a pair of Imperial capital ships. Several shots rip into your hull. You escape after suffering minor damage.

  • Crew recalled to ship
  • −1 hull HP
  1. Continue
oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_leaveEmpireE2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You apply full-burn to engines and make your escape.

  1. Continue

EmpireCultFleetBattle_bt

→ oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_bt_empire

→ oTxtEmpireCultFleetBattle_fightEmpireFlee_win

EmpireCultLifepods

oTxtEmpireCultLifepods_intro

You come across an Imperial vessel firing upon a nearby space colony. Life pods stream from the colony in all directions as its former inhabitants try to escape the onslaught. You hear an open broadcast from the Imperial ship: "Attention citizens of colony […]. Heretical activity has been detected within your ranks and by the command of the Solar Hegemon, your lives are now forfeit. May the Immortal King have mercy on your souls."

  1. Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsAttackIntro

    You quickly move to attack the Imperial ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsWin1

      The citizens of the colony contact you. They thank you for saving their lives and offer what they can in gratitude.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsWin2

      You receive a transmission from one of the life pods. Its occupant thanks you for dealing with the Imperials and offers to join your crew.

      • Random crew member
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsWin3

      You are contacted by the leader of the heretical cult aboard the colony. She sees your sudden appearance as a miracle granted by her dark masters, and makes you an offering.

      • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
  2. Attack the space colony
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsAttack1

      You lend your fire to the Imperial ship. Within minutes the space colony is reduced to ash. The Imperial vessel does not appear to notice your presence and departs, its task complete. You recover some material from the remains of the colony.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsAttack2

      You assist the Imperial ship in destroying the colony and recover some useful material.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
        oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsIdentify

        Afterwards, you receive an incoming message from the Imperials: "Unidentified vessel, state your purpose."

        1. Tell them you are here to deliver Imperial justice
          Random outcome (1/3 each):
          • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsLawful2

            The Imperials congratulate you on a job well done and swiftly depart.

            1. Continue
          • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsLawful1

            "Your ship lacks the military ident codes required to equip such an arsenal. In accordance with Imperial law, the punishment for such a violation is death." The Imperials move in to attack.

            1. Continue
            Fight! vs Empire ship
          • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsLawful3

            The Imperials are suspicious of your response, but before they have a chance to act, a cult vessel materializes out of subspace and blasts apart the Imperial ship. It then turns its weapons on you. "Many of my brothers died on that colony today. You will pay for this."

            1. Continue
            Fight! vs Cult Sectorspecific ship
        2. Tell them you were just looking for some action
          oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsNeutral

          "Aimless violence has no place in our Empire. You are a mad dog and you must be put down. "

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Empire ship
        3. Tell them you are here to reap souls as offerings to the dark gods
          Random outcome (1/2 each):
          • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsChaotic1

            "Blasphemous filth!"

            1. Continue
            Fight! vs Empire ship
          • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsChaotic2

            "Blasphemous cur!"

            1. Continue
              oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsChaotic3

              A hideous cackling rolls through your ship.

              1. Continue
              Fight! vs Empire ship
  3. Attempt to save a few life pods
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsSave2

      You rescue one of the lifepods only to find it infested with foul hellspawn.

      • 3–5 Monster crew boarders
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsSave1

      You manage to rescue a few lifepods. One of their occupants decides to join your crew.

      • Weak sector-appropriate cultist crew
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsSave4

      You prepare to intercept the lifepods when the Imperial ship suddenly notices you. They open fire without warning.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsSaveWin

      The citizens of the colony thank you for your sudden appearance, thinking it an act of salvation by their dark masters. They present an offering to you.

      • 60%: Random sector-appropriate cult psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
      1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultLifepodsSave3

      You dock with one of the lifepods and immediately find yourself under attack by zealots of the war cult. "Kill! Kill! Kill!"

      • 1–2 Berserker or Warseer boarders
      1. Continue
  4. Ignore the situation

EmpireCultOrbitalBattle

oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_intro

You detect an Imperial fleet moving towards one of the inhabited planets. They are moments away from arriving when a swarm of cultist vessels drops in. The Imperial fleet swings around and engages the swarm.

  1. Attack the cultist swarm
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackDeath

      You close in and identify the cultist vessels as belonging to worshippers of Gorgoth. A bulbous bloatskiff notices your approach and turns to engage.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Plague ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackDeath_win

      You survey the battlezone. The fight does not seem to be going well for the Imperial fleet.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Attack another cultist vessel
        oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_deathFight2

        A couple of fresh cultist reinforcements drop in from subspace. One of them begins to attack you.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Plague ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd1

          The battle is won. The Imperials quickly cordon off the battlezone to prevent the looting of cultist artifacts. A detachment of battlecruisers then move to bombard the planetary colonies from orbit.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd2

          The battle is won. Unfortunately the Imperials do not recognize you as an ally. It is time to move on.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd3

          The battle is lost. Several cultist vessels attack your ship in unison and soon you are driven away from the fight. Your hull sustains minor damage.

          • −1 hull HP
          1. Continue
      2. Disengage
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_deathLeave1

          You decide to disengage from the fight before you are overwhelmed.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_deathLeave2

          The cultists begin to overwhelm the Imperial fleet and your ship is struck as you break out of the melee.

          • −1 hull HP
          1. Continue
    • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackWar

      You close in and identify the cultist vessels as belonging to worshippers of Krom. One of the jagged vessels notices your approach and turns to engage.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd1
      • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd2
      • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd3
    • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackBlood

      You close in and identify the cultist vessels as belonging to the worshippers of Ariok. One of the sleek vessels notices your approach and turns to engage.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Blood ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackBlood_win

      You survey the battlezone. The fight does not seem to be going well for the Imperial fleet.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Attack another cultist vessel
        oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_bloodFight2

        You turn to attack one of the cultist vessels harassing an Imperial cruiser.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Blood ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd1
        • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd2
        • → oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_cultEnd3
      2. Disengage
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_bloodLeave1

          You decide to disengage from the fight before you are overwhelmed.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_bloodLeave2

          The cultists begin to overwhelm the Imperial fleet and your ship is struck as you break out of the melee.

          • −1 hull HP
          1. Continue
  2. Attack the Imperial fleet
    oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackImperial

    You move in to engage one of the Imperial starships.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackImperial_win

    The Imperial fleet is encircled, but you notice several starships are forming a detachment to attempt a breakout.

    • Crew recalled to ship
    1. Continue
      oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_attackImperial_win1

      Defeating the Imperial breakout detachment would rout the remainder of their fleet, but the approach will be dangerous. The Imperial vessels within the detachment are arrayed in a defensive formation.

      1. Attack the Imperial detachment
        oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_imperialFight2

        You assault the breakout detachment. The Imperial ships focus fire on you as you make your approach.

        • Damage to random system
        1. Continue
          oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_imperialFight2_1

          A few cultist vessels notice your action and begin engaging the Imperial detachment. You pick your target and attack.

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Empire ship
          After the rewards from the fight:
          oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_imperialFight2_win

          After hours of battle, the Imperial fleet is finally crushed. You pick up relieved transmissions from the surface of the nearby planet. You move on.

          1. Continue
      2. Disengage
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_imperialLeave2

          You disengage from the battle. The Imperial breakout is successful, and as you leave you see the cultist swarm driven off the battlezone.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_imperialLeave1

          An even larger Imperial fleet arrives. The cultist swarm collapses under the combined force of the two fleets and is soon routed. You manage to extricate yourself from the disaster having only taken a few glancing blows.

          • −1 hull HP
          1. Continue
  3. Leave the area
    oTxtEmpireCultOrbitalBattle_leave

    You avoid the battle and move on.

    1. Continue

You turn to attack one of the cultist vessels harassing an Imperial cruiser.

  1. Continue
