          You strike and disable the long range artillery that formed the centerpiece of the colony's defenses. The governor quickly capitulates and offers you a pair of worker husks.

          • Husk
          • Husk
          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/2 each):
            • oTxtRaiderAttackColony_sabotageB

              You leave the colony behind. During a routine check you discover one of the husks to be implanted with an explosive device. You remove it and mind wipe both units.

              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderAttackColony_sabotageA

              Soon after leaving you find yourself pursued by a small raider vessel. Suddenly an explosion rocks your ship. The servo-husks were evidently programmed to sabotage your ship.

              • Destroy random system
              1. Continue
              Fight! vs Raider ship
              After the rewards from the fight:
              oTxtRaiderAttackColony_sabotageA_win

              You reprogram the servo-husks. They should not cause any more problems.

              1. Continue
      3. Leave
        oTxtRaiderAttackColony_colonyLeave

        Nothing can be done about their situation. You move on.

        1. Continue
    2. Leave
      oTxtRaiderAttackColony_introLeave

      The damage to your ship is not significant enough to be worth stopping for.

      1. Continue
    3. (Raider Outlaw) Demand reparations
      oTxtRaiderAttackColony_bt_raider

      A member of your crew volunteers to negotiate with the colonial governor to compensate for damages. They are able to extort a large sum from the colony.

      • Large amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
oTxtRaiderAttackColony_payOffA Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Regardless of their intentions, they have damaged your vessel and owe you compensation. They proffer you a meager sum, explaining it is all they can spare.

  • Very small amount of ⬗ Scrap
  1. Continue
oTxtRaiderAttackColony_payOffB Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Whether or not their attack was a case of mistaken identity is irrelevant. You demand compensation. Before they can reply, a small band of raider ships jump in and start burning towards the colony.

  1. Defend the colony
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • → oTxtRaiderAttackColony_raidA
    • → oTxtRaiderAttackColony_raidB
  2. Attack the colony
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • → oTxtRaiderAttackColony_attackA
    • → oTxtRaiderAttackColony_attackB
  3. Leave
    → oTxtRaiderAttackColony_colonyLeave

RaiderAttackColony_attackA

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_attackA_winA

RaiderAttackColony_bt

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_bt_raider

RaiderAttackColony_intro

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_intro_b

RaiderAttackColony_raidA

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_raidA_winA

RaiderAttackColony_raidB

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_raidB_winA

RaiderAttackColony_sabotageA

→ oTxtRaiderAttackColony_sabotageA_win

RaiderAttackEmpire

oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_intro

You detect an Imperial ship under attack by a raider vessel.

  1. Attack the raider vessel
    oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_attack

    You move to engage the corsairs.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_winA

      Now that the raider ship has been dealt with, you hasten to contact the Imperial ship. The Imperial commander does not respond to you, although the vessel ejects a small supply crate before jumping out.

      • Random Imperial equipment
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_winB

      After dealing with the raider ship, you try to make contact with the Imperials. Unfortunately they appear to have already escaped.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_winC

      An Imperial reinforcement fleet arrives and begins engaging you. You escape, but not without suffering hull damage.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      • −1 hull HP
      1. Continue
  2. Leave the Imperials to their fate
    oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_leave

    You watch as more corsairs jump in. Eventually, they destroy the Imperial ship. You move in to recover what valuables are left after the raider fleet departs.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue
  3. (Hull Reaper) Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_bt_hullReaper1

    You prime your hull reaper system and engage the beleaguered Imperial ship. Your vessel's hull is regenerated as the Imperial ship crumbles beneath the assault.

    • +3–5 hull HP
    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_bt_hullReaper2

      The raider vessel flees, unwilling to risk more combat. You salvage the remnants of the destroyed Imperial ship and move on.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue

RaiderAttackEmpire_bt

→ oTxtRaiderAttackEmpire_bt_hullReaper1

RaiderBlastedExpanse

oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_intro

You have entered an area known as the Blasted Expanse.

  1. Explore
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateC

      Your crew finds itself alone, hidden in the vast field of wreckage. You spend several days resting and ensuring your ship is back in fighting trim.

      • Fully heal all crew
      • +2 hull HP
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateA

      A corsair ship breaks concealment from behind a large wreck.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateA2

          You prepare to fight.

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Raider ship
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateA1

          They open fire before you can respond, knocking out your engines.

          • Destroy Engines
          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Raider ship
    • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateB

      You are contacted by a corsair pilot. They are interested in competing against your starship in a race through the expanse. The loser would pay the winner 50 scrap.

      1. Accept (requires 50 scrap)
        Random outcome (1/5 each):
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept2

          Your ship is markedly superior and you handily win the race. Your opponent grudgingly pays you the wagered amount.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept4

          You are about to win the race when a flux conduit ruptures, losing you the race. You have no choice but to pay your opponent the wagered sum.

          • −50 ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept3

          Your opponent has a small lead on you when suddenly disaster strikes. Her starship smashes into a large asteroid. There is no chance of winning the wager, but you manage to recover a small amount of salvage from your opponent's wreck.

          • Random small reward
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept1

          Your opponent is fast, but your experience in handling your vessel wins the day. You rebound your vessel off a large wreck and ruin some hull plating, but you manage to beat your opponent to the finish coordinates by mere seconds. Your opponent pays you the wagered sum.

          • 1 breach spawned
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept5

          Unfortunately for you, your opponent's ship is tuned for racing. You lose by a large margin and pay your opponent the agreed sum.

          • −50 ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
            oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_accept6

            Your opponent takes an interest in your ship, and decide to help you tune your engines. Its output is significantly improved.

            • +1 to Engines
            1. Continue
      2. Decline
        oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_decline

        You decline and move on.

        1. Continue
      3. (Engine 4) Show them what winning looks like
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine1a

          You accept the challenge from the corsair pilot. You push your upgraded engines to the limit as your vessel blasts through the expanse, clearing the course well ahead of the corsair. The corsair pilot is impressed and pays you the wagered sum before leaving.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine1b

          You accept the challenge from the corsair pilot. Your upgraded engines perform magnificently, granting you a lead on your opponent.

          1. Continue
            oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine2

            The corsair attempts a risky maneuver towards the end of the course in a desperate bid to overtake you. Suddenly, the rear half of his vessel disappears in a great fireball. His engines had been pushed far past their limits and exploded, destroying his vessel.

            1. Continue
              oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine3

              The corsair pilot concedes his defeat. Unfortunately, with the loss of his ship he is unable to pay the wagered sum, but suggests that some value could be recovered from the remains of his shattered vessel.

              • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
              1. Continue
  2. Consult your databanks
    oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_consult

    The Blasted Expanses are regions littered with the corpses of starships from ancient wars. Although any resources of value have been stripped bare long ago, these areas still remain a popular hiding place among the smaller gangs of corsairs.

    1. Investigate
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateC
      • → oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateA
      • → oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_investigateB
    2. Move on
      oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_leave

      You decide to pass through the region as quickly as possible.

      1. Continue
  3. Move on
    → oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_leave
  4. (Improved Sensors) Manually tune your sensors to track the enemy
    → oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_leave

RaiderBlastedExpanse_bt

→ oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine1a
oTxtRaiderBlastedExpanse_bt_engine4 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Having helped in the salvage effort, the corsair offers to join your crew, having become an admirer of your ship handling.

  • crewArray_raiderFighter
  1. Continue

RaiderCivilianColony

oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_intro

A civilian colony is visible ahead. Cannon fire streaks across the void and you realize the colony is under attack.

  1. Assist the colony
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_assist1

      You power up your weapons and move in.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_assist1A

        The colony's inhabitants thank you for your help and transfer over a small reward.

        • Random small reward
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_assist1B

        Unfortunately, the colony was destroyed by another corsair vessel during the attack.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_assist2

      You move in to engage the attackers when suddenly an Imperial ship emerges. They target your ship, announcing loudly over the comms: "The enemies of the Throne will be met with a swift end." Before you have a chance to explain yourself, they open fire.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_assist2A

      More Imperial reinforcements arrive and you soon find yourself blanketed in hail of cannon fire. You manage to escape but not before taking a few hits.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      • 2–3 breaches spawned
      1. Continue
  2. Ignore the colony
    oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_ignore

    You decide not to get involved.

    1. Continue
  3. (Shield 6) Shield the colony from attack
    oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_bt_shield

    You interpose your vessel between the attacking ship and the colony. A multitude of cannon shells detonate harmlessly across your enhanced shielding. Dissuaded by your presence, the attacker quickly turns to leave the area.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_bt_shield2

      The civilian colony is grateful for your assistance. They offer to service your vessel and crew before sending you off with some supplies.

      • Random moderate reward
      • +5 hull HP
      • Heal all crew by 50%
      1. Continue

RaiderCivilianColony_bt

→ oTxtRaiderCivilianColony_bt_shield

RaiderInfightAscend

oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_intro

You stumble upon a lone corsair vessel adrift, surrounded by nearly a dozen smoldering wrecks of his cohorts.

  1. Attack the corsair vessel
    oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_attack

    The corsair captain laughs at you savagely. "Heh. What's one more for tallies?" They power their weapons and move to meet your attack.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_attack_win

    You check the other wrecks but discover nothing worth salvaging.

    1. Continue
  2. Salvage the wrecks
    Random outcome (1/5 each):
    • oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageC

      The corsair vessel hails you. "You filthy rat, what do you think you are doing?"

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
    • oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageA

      The corsair vessel does not react to you approaching the wrecks. Most of the ships have been thoroughly gutted by fires, but you manage to recover a few articles of value.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageD

      The corsair vessel jumps out as you approach. A cursory search through all the wrecks reveals that whatever cargo they possessed had been carried off by the corsairs. You leave empty-handed.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageB

      The corsair vessel does not react. You find little of value in the wrecks, but at last you discover a strange artifact in the rigid clutches of a dead raider.

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageB1

        As soon as you touch the artifact the corsair captain begins shrieking violently over the comms. He engages his weapon systems. Sensing danger, you scramble back to your ship. The corsair vessel promptly fires upon you, scoring a glancing hit.

        • 1 breach spawned
        • 1–3 Raider crew boarders
        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Raider ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageB1_1

        You take a closer look at the strange artifact and decide it may be of some use.

        • Random cult equipment
        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageE

      The corsair vessel seems to be waiting for something and takes no notice of you. You recover some equipment from the wrecks.

      • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageE1

        Several Kromic warships emerge from subspace. They form up around the lone corsair vessel, bristling with occult energies. You intercept a transmission: "The spilled blood of your brothers gains you entry to Krom's dominion." Then suddenly, without warning, the ships of the infernal congregation engage their drives and depart.

        1. Continue
  3. Leave
    oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_leave

    You decide to not get involved.

    1. Continue
  4. (War Cultist) Recruit the corsair
    oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_bt_war

    A cultist member of your crew recognizes the scene as a Kromic initiation ritual. Your crewmember believes the corsair is worthy of induction into the Cult of War.

    1. Continue

RaiderInfightAscend_attack

→ oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_attack_win

RaiderInfightAscend_bt

→ oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_bt_war
oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_bt_war2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You send your cultist crewmember to contact the corsair. The corsair was hopeful his deed would gain the attention of the God of War, and is quickly initiated under the tutelage of your cultist crew. The newly inducted cultist abandons his vessel to join your crew.

  • Berserker
  1. Continue

RaiderInfightAscend_salvageB1

→ oTxtRaiderInfightAscend_salvageB1_1

RaiderInfightWrecks

oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_intro

Weapon fire flashes in the distance. As you close in, you see raiders vessels attacking each other. The few raider ships that managed to survive the engagement hastily jump away, leaving you alone in the aftermath.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/6 each):
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateA

      You manage to find some intact cargo on one of the wrecks.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateC

      You recover an assortment of valuables from aboard one of the wrecks.

      • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateB

      You discover an armored vault on one of the wrecks. With effort you are able to crack the vault, and recover a peculiar relic.

      • 60%: Random cult psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateE

      A fresh raider ship arrives in the midst of your salvage operation. "Oh, you scavvin' rats!" You scramble back to your ship in time to defend against the oncoming attack.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateE_win

      More raiders arrive on the scene and begin engaging you. You manage to escape without taking any hits.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateF

      You recover some useful salvage from one of the wrecks.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateF2

        An escape pod crashes into your hull. A ragged band of survivors from one of the wrecks is attempting to hijack your ship.

        • 2–3 Raider crew boarders
        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateD

      You discover an unconscious survivor aboard one of the wrecks. You bring them back to your ship to recuperate.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateD2

          The survivor recovers and decides to join your crew.

          • Raider crew
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateD3

          Unfortunately the survivor never regains consciousness.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateD1

          The survivor awakens and begins screaming unintelligibly. They break free and begin rampaging through your ship.

          • 1 Raider crew boarder
          1. Continue
  2. Ignore
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_leave2

      You move on.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_leave1

      As you leave the scene behind, you witness the arrival of a large contingent of raider vessels. You intercept a few fragmentary transmissions. "...find out.... ...they went... ...vent their escape."

      1. Continue
  3. (Commando) Explore the wreckage field
    oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_bt_commando

    You take advantage of the spacewalking capabilities enabled by your crewmember's exosuit to conduct a thorough search of the wreckage. You come away with a large quantity of valuable salvage.

    • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Random ship weapon
    • Small amount of missile ammo (3–6)
    1. Continue

RaiderInfightWrecks_bt

→ oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_bt_commando

RaiderInfightWrecks_investigateE

→ oTxtRaiderInfightWrecks_investigateE_win

RaiderKamikazePod

oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_intro

You reenter realspace within a large asteroid belt, and upon a cursory scan you detect a single raider ship. The ship redirects itself towards yours, and launches what appears to be an escape pod. The pod makes no effort to flee, but instead rapidly accelerates towards your ship. A single life signature and heavy explosives are detected within the pod.

  1. Dodge the pod
    oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_dodge1

    You attempt to swerve away from the pod, but it proves too quick. Your ship is broadsided in explosive fashion, knocking out numerous critical systems. The raider ship before you closes the gap and charges its weapons.

    • −1 hull HP
    • 1 system damage to Shields
    • 1 system damage to Weapons
    • 1 system damage to Engines
    • 1–2 breaches spawned
    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
  2. (Engines 4) Put full power to engines
    oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_engines1

    You initiate a full burn and narrowly dodge the oncoming pod. Despite the failure of their kamikaze attack, the raider ship still engages you.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_engines2A

      You perform another scan as you salvage the enemy ship, and learn their kamikaze pod struck a large asteroid. The resultant explosion left nothing else to salvage. You move on.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_engines2B

      You perform another scan as you salvage the enemy ship, and learn their kamikaze pod struck a large asteroid. The resultant explosion left nothing else to salvage. You move on.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_engines2C

      As you scan the remains of the raider ship, you detect the kamikaze pod deep within the asteroid belt. During your encounter it collided with a large asteroid. Though its pilot died from the crash, its payload evidently failed to detonate. You salvage its remains.

      • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
      • Claymore Missile
      1. Continue
  3. (Hex Priest) Disable the pod
    oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_disable1

    Your machine priest bombards the oncoming pod with command-strings and virulent data-viruses. In short order its steering is killed and its engines are overloaded. The now uncontrollably tumbling pod proves easy to dodge. You turn your attention to the raider ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    oTxtRaiderKamikazePod_disable2

    With the ship now destroyed, you receive a distress signal from the kamikaze pod. Its occupant, visibly and audibly nauseous from their miserable journey, begs to be rescued. You stabilize their still spinning pod and offer them a place on your ship. They gladly accept, and dizzily stumble aboard. You recover the pods explosive contents as well -- though they reek of vomit they shall surely find some use.

    • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
    • Claymore Missile
    • Corsair, Scavenger, Infiltrator, or Gene Soldier
    1. Continue

RaiderLootbox

oTxtRaiderLootbox_intro

You are hailed by a corsair scavenger. She is hauling a sealed shipping container, and is looking for a buyer.

  1. Buy the container (15 scrap)
    oTxtRaiderLootbox_buy

    The scavenger accepts your payment and departs, leaving behind the sealed shipping container. "[…]"

    • −15 ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue
      Random outcome (weighted):
      • 1/6
        oTxtRaiderLootbox_openC

        You open the container. There is some unique technology inside.

        • Random ship module
        1. Continue
      • 1/6
        oTxtRaiderLootbox_openB

        You open the container. The interior is filled with protective equipment cradling a single psychomantic wafer.

        • Random psychic item
        1. Continue
      • 2/3
        oTxtRaiderLootbox_openA

        You open the container. Most of it is worthless merchandise, but you manage to find a piece of useful equipment within.

        • Random equipment item
        1. Continue
  2. Decline
    oTxtRaiderLootbox_leave

    Your capital is better spent on certainties. You decline the offer and move on.

    1. Continue
  3. (Raider Outlaw) Receive the container as a gift
    oTxtRaiderLootbox_bt_raider

    The corsair scavenger recognizes one of your crew as an old colleague. They spend some time reminiscing about past exploits. The scavenger leaves the container in your possession without charge, as a gift from a friend.

    1. Continue
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • → oTxtRaiderLootbox_openC
      • → oTxtRaiderLootbox_openB
      • → oTxtRaiderLootbox_openA

RaiderLootbox_bt

→ oTxtRaiderLootbox_bt_raider

RaiderManufacturingRaid

oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_intro

You arrive in-system and immediately find yourself in the middle of a massive corsair fleet action. They are performing a raid on an Imperial starship manufacturing complex and you are caught in the middle of it. Several Imperial ships have already emerged from the complex, ready to fight off the corsair fleet. You only have a few moments before someone notices you.

  1. Defend the Imperial complex
    oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_defend

    You lock on to the nearest corsair ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_defend2

    The battle continues to rage. You scan for more targets.

    • Crew recalled to ship
    1. Attack one of the larger corsair vessels
      oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackLarge

      You go after one of the larger corsair ships.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider Large ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackLarge_win

      The battle has come to an end. The corsair fleet has been successfully driven off. One of the commanders of the Imperial ships contacts you. "Unidentified vessel. Even though your ship is in flagrant violation of Imperial code, your deeds here today prove you are worthy of our respect. We thank you for your assistance."

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    2. Attack one of the smaller corsair vessels
      oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackSmall

      You move to engage one of the smaller corsair ships.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider Small ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackSmall_win

      More corsair reinforcements arrive and soon the Imperial forces are overwhelmed. The corsairs lay waste to the manufacturing complex. You are forced to retreat.

      1. Continue
  2. Join the corsair fleet in the attack
    oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack

    You lock on to the nearest Imperial starship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack1

      The Imperial defense has been crushed. You join in with the corsairs in pillaging the manufacturing complex. An untended weapons cache catches your eye.

      • Random ship weapon
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_preJoinAttack2

      The battle continues around you.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2

        You find yourself taking fire from another Imperial starship.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Empire ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_preJoinAttack2_a

        The corsair fleet is victorious.

        1. Continue
          oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2_a

          There is nothing of value left in the manufacturing complex. The raiders thoroughly plundered the manufacturing complex during your prolonged engagement with the Imperial forces. You move on.

          1. Continue
  3. Try to escape
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_escape

      You apply full-burn to engines and manage to escape unnoticed.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_escape2

      You attempt to escape. Unfortunately one of the corsair vessels notices you and moves in to engage your ship.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the fight:
      oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_escape2_win

      With the raider ship destroyed, you are free and clear to make your escape. You get out of there before anyone else notices you.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
  4. (Raider Outlaw) Assist in the raid
    oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_bt_raider

    You join in the attack. The motley defenders of the outpost are quickly overwhelmed. One of your crew members is well acquainted with the customs of the raider clans, and is able to negotiate for a portion of the loot.

    • Random moderate reward
    1. Continue

RaiderManufacturingRaid_attackLarge

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackLarge_win

RaiderManufacturingRaid_attackSmall

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_attackSmall_win

RaiderManufacturingRaid_bt

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_bt_raider

RaiderManufacturingRaid_escape2

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_escape2_win

RaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2_a
oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2_b Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Your battle has drawn the attention of more corsair starships. They begin firing at you, and you have no choice but to retreat. A few shots pierce your hull.

  • Crew recalled to ship
  • −1 hull HP
  1. Continue
oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_joinAttack2_c Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Your battle has drawn the attention of more corsair starships. They begin firing at you, and you have no choice but to retreat.

  • Crew recalled to ship
  1. Continue

RaiderManufacturingRaid_preJoinAttack2

→ oTxtRaiderManufacturingRaid_preJoinAttack2_a

RaiderMiningFactory

oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_intro

You discover a small mining outpost on one of the moons orbiting a large gas giant. The mining camp is dominated by a large pre-fab structure that has been damaged. As your ship approaches the camp, you see signs of battle: scores of corpses of men and husks and destroyed machinery. Some of the bodies belong to members of the Technocult while others belong to the raider clans.

  1. Investigate the mining camp
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA

    While the camp is picked clean, your ship's multispex shows signs of activity within the larger building. You decide to venture in and realize this place must have been a factory of some kind. Racks of large, cobbled-together suits of mechanized armour cover most of the interior, and at the center you see a small workshop. Your scouts inform you that a single data terminal is still active and might contain valuable information.

    1. Access the terminal
      Random outcome (1/3 each):
      • oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access2

        You access the terminal and suddenly your ship's proximity alarms activate. Whoever attacked this installation has found you.

        • 3–4 Husk, Servo-husk, or Combat Husk boarders
        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Techno ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access2_win

        The last enemy is no more. You take what you can and leave.

        • Random moderate reward
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access3

        As you investigate the terminal, you hear an explosion followed by sounds of combat. A Technocult ship appears on your multispex, and your ship is boarded by hostiles.

        • Damage to random system
        • 3–4 Any Technocult crew boarders
        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Techno ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access3_win

        The enemies are dead. You scavenge some equipment and leave.

        • Random large reward
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access

        You activate the terminal and download its contents. The data contains a set of coordinates and notes for attacking a large merchant vessel. You hear a click, and a hidden compartment opens next to the terminal containing equipment. AND

        • Breach Charge ×2
        • Machine Pistol ×2
        • Quest marker added to map: oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_intro
        1. Continue
    2. Ignore the terminal and scavenge the factory
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_scavenge

        The exo-suits are rich in scrap, if nothing else.

        • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_scavenge2

        As your crew begins to scavenge the station, they come across a compartment containing active husks! They rush in and board your ship.

        • 4–6 Husk boarders
        1. Continue
        After the boarders are defeated:
        oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_scavengel2_win

        The last foe is defeated. You finish scavenging the station.

        • Random moderate reward
        1. Continue
  2. Move on
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_moveOn

    You move on.

    1. Continue

RaiderMiningFactoryQuest

oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_intro

Your ship lurches as you enter the system. In the distance you see a pulsing neutron star. Orbiting the only planet in this system are the scattered remains of multiple starships.

  1. Continue
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_intro1

    This is where the coordinates you gained earlier point to, and it is likely that there might still be hostiles in this system. Approaching the battlefield, you recognize wrecked ships belonging both to the Technocult and the raider clans. At the center there is a badly damaged Imperial trade frigate.

    1. Investigate the remains of the trade frigate
      oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_investigate

      Your scouts investigate the remains of the ship thoroughly. Reinforced walls and doors reveal that whatever cargo the ship had must have been particularly valuable or dangerous.

      1. Continue
    2. Leave
      oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_leave

      You leave the system.

      1. Continue
oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_investigate1

After hours of exploration, you find a large, locked storage chamber, undamaged and pristine despite the surrounding carnage. The blast door at the entrance looks like advanced technology, and you are certain that breaking through the door will broadcast a signal that will alert whoever attacked this ship. It feels like a trap, but scans show powerful energy readings from the other side of the door.

  1. Break into the storage chamber
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA

    The blast door yields and the alarm is tripped. Two ships appear on your sensors, and your crew barely manages to ransack the storage chamber before the attack comes.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Random ship weapon
    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Techno ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA_victory

    The first ship has been defeated. You quickly prepare to defend against further attack.

    • Crew recalled to ship
    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA_victory1

      The second vessel attacks you.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Techno ship
      After the fight:
      oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA_victory2

      The second ship falls silent.

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA_victory3

        You search the wreckage for valuables, and then move on.

        • Random moderate reward
        1. Continue
  2. Destroy the ship
    oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultC

    A barrage from your weapons demolishes the entire station. Your crew manage to scavenge some scrap. As you destroy the base, a Technocult assault ship emerges from the void and attacks

    • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Random Raider equipment
    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Techno ship

RaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA

→ oTxtRaiderMiningFactoryQuest_vaultA_victory

RaiderMiningFactory_investigateA

→ oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access

RaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access2

→ oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access2_win

RaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access3

→ oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_access3_win

RaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_scavengel2

→ oTxtRaiderMiningFactory_investigateA_scavengel2_win

RaiderMunitionsDepot

oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_intro

Your cartographic data indicates the presence of an Imperial munitions depot. As you approach, a corsair starship suddenly drops out of subspace and begins firing at the depot. The workers of the depot broadcast a request for help.

  1. Defend the munitions depot
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_defendMunitions1

      You engage your weapons systems and prepare to fight.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_defendMunitions1A

        The depot workers thank you for saving their lives. They decide to transfer over a shipment of munitions. "We know you will put these to good use."

        • Large amount of missile ammo (8–12) and 1/2 chance for 1 missile blueprint
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_defendMunitions2B

        A stray shot has destroyed the munitions depot. There is nothing left to recover.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_defendMunitions2

      As you move in to attack, a second raider starship emerges from hiding. The two vessels begin firing upon each other. You overhear intense yelling over the comms, "...Back off, you stupid, slag-eating, pile of... "

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_defendMunitions2A

        The two corsair ships end up destroying each other in the ensuing fight. You return to the munitions depot and contact the overseer. He is as dumbfounded as you are about what just happened. He nevertheless sends you a small reward in appreciation of your efforts.

        • Random small reward
        1. Continue
  2. Ignore the request
    oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_ignore

    You ignore them and decide not to get involved.

    1. Continue
  3. (Engine 3) Launch a surprise strike against the raiders
    oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_engine

    Your enhanced engines propel your vessel at full burn towards the attacking raider vessel. The raiders are caught by surprise.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_engine2

      The depot commandant is appreciative of your actions. They present you with a portion of their stockpile. "I should not be doing this, but you are perhaps more deserving than most."

      • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
      • Random missile blueprint
      1. Continue
  4. (Weapons 4) Intimidate the raiders
    oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_weapons

    You approach the raider vessel, weapons charged. Alarmed at the bristling armament of your vessel, the raiders beat a hasty retreat.

    1. Continue
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_weapons3

        The depot hails you. They offer you one of their newly refurbished starship weaponry in gratitude.

        • Random ship weapon
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_weapons2

        The depot hails you. The depot commandant is regretful that he is unauthorized to dispense his stockpile of munitions as a reward, but offers you his personal sidearm in gratitude.

        • Goreblaster or Assault Pistol or Rotblaster or Machine Pistol
        1. Continue

RaiderMunitionsDepot_bt

→ oTxtRaiderMunitionsDepot_bt_engine

RaiderPenalColony

oTxtRaiderPenalColony_intro

The small, barren moon ahead marks the location of an Imperial penal colony.

  1. Check out the colony
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkA

      You make contact with the warden and learn that the colony's facilities have exceeded their maximum capacity. Normally the wardens are expected to build new facilities, but this one offers to sell a few prisoners to you as slaves.

      • Proceeds to shop
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkC

      As you approach the colony, you detect an Imperial hauler carrying a shipment of prisoners. Suddenly a corsair vessel drops in and begins firing at the hauler. They shoot out the hauler's engines and look as if they are about to board it.

      1. Defend the hauler
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_defendB

          You target lock the corsair vessel. They break off from pursuing the hauler to engage you.

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Raider ship
          After the rewards from the fight:
          oTxtRaiderPenalColony_defendB_win

          The prison warden makes contacts with you, thanking you for the assistance. She sends you a shipment of excess prison slaves as a reward for your efforts.

          • Low-tier mixed crew reward
          • Low-tier mixed crew reward
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_defendA

          You fire a few shots at the corsairs. Upon noticing your presence, they immediately turn and run. Later, you make contact with the colony warden. He is grateful for your help and offers to sell you some of their wares.

          • Proceeds to shop
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_defendC

          As you power up your weapons, your console receives an incoming tightbeam: "Hold on there, friend. No one has to die here today. We just wanna get our buddies outta that dirt heap. Let us go and we could make it worth your while. How about a few extra slaves to crew your ship?"

          1. Agree
            oTxtRaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeAgree

            You agree to let them go. They board the prison ship and extricate their criminal friends from its cells. Afterwards, they make good on their promise and send you a stasis pod containing a mind-locked prisoner.

            • Low-tier mixed crew reward
            1. Continue
          2. Refuse
            oTxtRaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeRefuse

            "Oh, come on."

            1. Continue
            Fight! vs Raider ship
            After the rewards from the fight:
            Random outcome (1/2 each):
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeRefuse_win1

              Unfortunately the Imperial hauler was destroyed in the attack. You pick up a drifting stasis pod from the aftermath and decide to let its occupant join your crew.

              • Low-tier mixed crew reward
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeRefuse_win2

              You receive a transmission from the pilot of the Imperial hauler. "Thanks for the help. I do not have much, but here, take this for your troubles."

              • Random small reward
              1. Continue
      2. Flee
        oTxtRaiderPenalColony_flee

        You decide to avoid confrontation and get out of there.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkB

      The colony warden establishes a tightbeam link. "There's been a prison break. Can you help us contain the prisoners? Naturally, you would be rewarded, should you succeed."

      1. Agree to help
        Random outcome (1/4 each):
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree2

          You bring your crew down to the colony and put each one in charge of a kill team tasked with capturing or neutralizing the escaped prisoners. After two days of firefights, all of the escapees are dead or captured. The colony warden congratulates your men on a job well done and offers you a modest reward.

          • Random moderate reward
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree1

          You are given command of a small squad of Imperial arbitrators.

          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/2 each):
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree1B

              After several days of intense combat in the underslum tunnel networks, you finally finish rounding up the escaped prisoners. The warden thanks you for the assistance and transfers over a modest shipment of material.

              • Random small reward
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree1A

              Unfortunately the escaped prisoners manage to shut down the reactor banks governing the administrative cell blocks, locking you and your team inside for several days. The prisoners use this time to steal a shuttle and escape off-planet. Your mission is a failure. You are forced to leave empty-handed.

              1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4

          The warden tasks you with blockading the penal colony from orbit. If any of the prisoners manage to make it into space, your job is to shoot them down.

          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/2 each):
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4A

              Sure enough, several unidentified shuttles make it into orbit. You open fire at them, blasting them to smithereens. The warden contacts you and confirms that all prisoners have been accounted for. You are rewarded with a small shipment of supplies.

              • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4B

              You begin your patrol. Suddenly you receive a transmission from the warden warning you that several prisoners have made it into space. Just as you make visual contact, a volley of cannon fire impacts your ship from behind, taking out your engines. You hear a voice over the comms: "The clan father has some business to attend to, and he cannot do that business from inside a jail cell. Now get out of our way. "

              • Destroy Engines
              1. Continue
              Fight! vs Raider ship
              After the rewards from the fight:
              Random outcome (1/2 each):
              • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4B_1

                Unfortunately the escapees managed to rendezvous with another corsair vessel while you were occupied. They jumped out before anyone could stop them. The colony warden is furious.

                1. Continue
              • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4B_2

                A shuttle craft appears on your sensors. These must be the prisoners the corsairs were trying to liberate. You act quickly and shoot out their drives. Without weapons or defenses, the prisoners do not put up much of a fight. You capture them and bring them back down to the colony.

                1. Continue
                  oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4B_3

                  The colony warden is thrilled with your success. She promptly sends you your payment before returning to her administrative duties.

                  • Random moderate reward
                  1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree3

          You arrive at the colony with your crew and begin your search. Unfortunately, a large sandstorm begins almost as soon as you arrive. The prisoners use this opportunity to escape into the dunes on the outskirts of the colony.

          1. Pursue them
            Random outcome (1/4 each):
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueA_solo

              You try to pursue them but it is no use. You are forced to call off the search.

              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueA

              You try to pursue them but it is no use. One of your men gets lost in the sandstorm and you are forced to call off the search.

              • Lose a random crew member
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueC

              You pursue the prisoners through the sandstorm and manage to capture all of them. The colony warden is impressed. He decides to assign one of his men to your crew as a reward for your efforts.

              • Imperial Enforcer or Imperial Marshal
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueB

              You pursue them through the sandstorm, tracking their movements and relaying their coordinates to the colony. When the sandstorm subsides, the warden sends out a task force to capture the prisoners.

              1. Continue
                Random outcome (1/2 each):
                • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueB2

                  The operation fails. Nevertheless, the warden sends you a small payment for your efforts.

                  • Random small reward
                  1. Continue
                • oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueB1

                  The operation is successful. The warden thanks you for your assistance. One of the junior members of the task force decides to join your crew.

                  • Imperial Recruit
                  1. Continue
          2. Call off the search
            oTxtRaiderPenalColony_callOff

            You call off the search and return to your ship.

            1. Continue
      2. Decline
        oTxtRaiderPenalColony_decline

        You decide not to get involved.

        1. Continue
  2. Consult your databanks
    oTxtRaiderPenalColony_consult

    Imperial penal colonies are backwater outposts located on the fringes of the Wastes where criminals, whose wrongdoings appear on the short list of infractions deemed too mild for execution, are sent to live out their days.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderPenalColony_consult2

      These colonies are often run by corrupt wardens who make unsanctioned agreements with the raider clans in exchange for the basic resources so often withheld by Imperial magistrates.

      1. Check out the colony
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • → oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkA
        • → oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkC
        • → oTxtRaiderPenalColony_checkB
      2. Move on
        oTxtRaiderPenalColony_moveOn

        You press on.

        1. Continue
  3. Move on
    → oTxtRaiderPenalColony_moveOn
  4. (Launch Bay) Launch a breakout raid
    oTxtRaiderPenalColony_bt_launchBay

    You launch an assault sled towards the Imperial penal colony. It crashes into one of the walls of the vast complex.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderPenalColony_bt_launchBay2

      Before long you notice a request signal for retrieval from within the colony. Someone must have reached the assault sled and activated one of the recall beacons carried within.

      1. Continue

RaiderPenalColony_agree4B

→ oTxtRaiderPenalColony_agree4B_1

RaiderPenalColony_bt

→ oTxtRaiderPenalColony_bt_launchBay
oTxtRaiderPenalColony_bt_launchBay3 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You respond to the signal and soon receive the escapee on your vessel. They appear willing and able to become a member of your crew.

  • Gain crew: Prisoner
  1. Continue

RaiderPenalColony_defendB

→ oTxtRaiderPenalColony_defendB_win

RaiderPenalColony_pursueA

→ oTxtRaiderPenalColony_pursueA_solo

RaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeRefuse

→ oTxtRaiderPenalColony_raiderFleeRefuse_win1

RaiderRaid

oTxtRaiderRaid_intro

As you arrive at this system, you are contacted by the captain of a small group of raider ships. The captain is mustering a small force to raid an Imperial transport ship. If you help him, you will get an even share. They assure you that there will be no foul play -- the raider group could have attacked you the moment you arrived to the system if they wanted to.

  1. Accept the offer
    oTxtRaiderRaid_accept

    You accept the raider captain's offer. They give a curt nod and give you coordinates to the target system.

    • Quest marker added to map: oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_intro
    1. Continue
  2. Decline the offer
    oTxtRaiderRaid_decline

    The captain nods and cuts off the comms line. You move on.

    1. Continue

RaiderRaidQuest

oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_intro

You arrive at the coordinates given to you by the raider captain and you notice your raiding companions already waiting nearby. In the distance you see the Imperial transport ship. Even these ships carry religious ornamentation and detail exalting the Radiant Dogma.

  1. Continue
    oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_intro2

    The transport ship is flanked by an Imperial escort consisting of three ships, and you assume that the transport ship has its own defenses. The raider captain contacts you and asks that you focus on the escort. The raiders break formation and begin their assault.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_raid

      Your crew takes battle stations and you join the raid. You target one of the smaller escort ships and engage in combat. However, the Imperials were prepared, sending boarders onto your ship.

      • 3–4 Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, or Imperial Marshal boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the fight:
      oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_raid_win

      As the Imperial ship falls you notice that the attack plan was very successful. The other raider ships have destroyed the rest of the Imperial ships, and the transport ship lies inert. The raiders lost only a single ship in the fight.

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_raid_win2

        The captain contacts you with glee and the thrill of another triumph under his belt. He offers you a fair share as the plunder is split evenly among everyone.

        • Large amount of ⬗ Scrap
        • Random ship module
        • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
        1. Continue

RaiderRaidQuest_raid

→ oTxtRaiderRaidQuest_raid_win

RaiderRefinery

oTxtRaiderRefinery_intro

You arrive in-system to find a small Imperial outpost-refinery under attack by a corsair ship.

  1. Intervene
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_interveneA

      The corsair ship turns its weapons on you. Its captain relays a message. "Back off, this outpost is ours."

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderRefinery_interveneA2

      The workers aboard the outpost-refinery thank you for saving them and offer you some supplies.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_interveneC

      You move in to attack. As soon as you make it into firing range, the corsairs begin powering up their drives, clearly intimidated by your presence. Moments later, their ship successfully executes subspace translation and departs.

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderRefinery_interveneC2

        The outpost's workers thank you for the assistance and send you some supplies in gratitude.

        • Random small reward
        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_interveneB

      "Wait. Let us go and we shall split the proceeds. What do you say?"

      1. Accept
        oTxtRaiderRefinery_accept

        You let the corsairs resume their attack. Soon the outpost's defenses are neutralized. The corsairs waste no time in stripping it of anything of value. They make good on their deal and deliver you your share.

        • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
        1. Continue
      2. Refuse
        oTxtRaiderRefinery_refuse

        "Fine. We will let them go. Just do not shoot. No one has to get hurt here."

        1. Continue
          Random outcome (1/2 each):
          • oTxtRaiderRefinery_refuseA

            The corsairs engage their subspace drives and jump out. You return to the outpost and are greeted by a crowd of relieved workers. They proclaim you a hero and give you what they can in thanks.

            • Random moderate reward
            1. Continue
          • oTxtRaiderRefinery_refuseB

            The corsairs activate their drives and jump out. You return to the outpost only to find that a self-destruct sequence has been initiated. The workers must have evacuated while you were dealing with the corsairs. Moments later, the outpost explodes, causing some minor damage to your hull.

            • −1 hull HP
            1. Continue
  2. Wait and see what happens
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_waitC

      The corsairs open fire on the outpost. Suddenly, two Imperial ships drop in from subspace. One of the Imperials attacks you, suspecting you to be in league with the corsairs. "Prepare to die, pirate scum."

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderRefinery_waitC2

      With the Imperial ship destroyed, you return to the outpost and find that it has been fully evacuated. The other corsair ship is nowhere to be found. You recover some material from the outpost and get out of there.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_waitA

      The corsairs make short work of the Imperials. Soon the outpost is nothing more than drifting heaps of twisted metal. You wait for the corsairs to depart, then move in to scavenge what remains of the destroyed outpost.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRefinery_waitB

      The corsairs overpower the outpost's defenses and board it. After they leave, you move in to inspect what remains. You arrive at the outpost and find that all of its inhabitants have been slaughtered. There is nothing of value left for you to take.

      1. Continue
  3. Ignore it and move on
    oTxtRaiderRefinery_ignore

    You ignore the outpost and move on.

    1. Continue
  4. (Engine 4) Launch a fast strike on the corsair ship
    oTxtRaiderRefinery_bt_engine

    You command your engines to maximum output and race towards the corsair ship. The sheer speed granted by your upgraded drive thrusters catches the corsairs by total surprise.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    oTxtRaiderRefinery_bt_engine2

    The outpost thanks you for your assistance. They offer you some of their production surplus.

    • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue
  5. (Infiltrator) Slip in and raid the outpost
    oTxtRaiderRefinery_bt_sapper

    You approach the Imperial refinery from a blind spot and disembark your sapper at a poorly maintained evacuation port. Having cut their way into the refinery, your crewmember quickly ascertains the location of their logistical warehouses. You are able to secure a large quantity of Imperial supplies before making away as quietly as you arrived.

    • Large amount of ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue

RaiderRefinery_bt

→ oTxtRaiderRefinery_bt_engine

RaiderRemnantStars

oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_intro

You have entered a region known as the Remnant Stars. The area is populated by old stars drained of fire by the ultra-advanced generation ships of the early days of the Empire's founding. Such technology now only exists in legend.

  1. Explore
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateC

      You discover signs of life upon one of the small planets close enough to receive the feeble light of the nearby star. An old hermit lives here upon a humble but efficient homestead.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateC1

          The hermit seems very irritated to see you. "Go away, go away!"

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateC2

          The hermit's face lights up. "I have been expecting you, you know. You have a very particular destiny." They request to join your crew.

          • Imperial Scribe, Imperial Acolyte, Imperial Sorcerer, Imperial Magister, or High Magister
          • Fireball
          1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateA

      You stumble across a lost starship. There is visible damage across its hull, and its crew are in poor health. "Our food ran out weeks ago, and several of us have already starved to death. Help us, please..."

      1. Give them your spare provisions
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionC

          The lost starship does not contact you any further. You move on.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionA

          You transfer over some of your provisions. The captain of the lost starship showers you with thanks as you depart.

          • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionB

          They revel in their newfound strength. "There's... must be more where that came from." The lost starship launches an assault pod at your vessel, and you prepare to repel the boarders.

          • 3–4 Low-tier mixed crew reward boarders
          1. Continue
          After the boarders are defeated:
          oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionB_1

          The enemy crew has been eliminated. There is nothing of value in their starship, but you recover an improvised weapon from one of the deceased. You proceed onwards.

          • Plague Knife
      2. Attack the ship
        oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_attack

        You decide to put them out of their misery.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Raider ship
      3. Leave
        oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_leaveToDie

        You move on.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB

      You investigate the region and discover a derelict ship.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/6 each):
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB1

          Its crew seems to have asphyxiated. You recover a few useful items.

          • Random moderate reward
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB5

          The ship has been picked clean long before you arrived. You move on.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB3

          No trace of the crew can be found. You find a small amount of salvage aboard the derelict.

          • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB2

          The crew of this ship seems to have resorted to cannibalism before finally succumbing to starvation. You recover a weapon, pried from the hands of the final survivor.

          • 60%: Random Raider weapon / 40%: Random weapon item
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB4

          You inspect the ship's databanks and recover records detailing the fate of the crew. It seems they had all killed each other in a fit of madness. You discover a peculiar artifact upon one of the corpses.

          • 60%: Random cult psychic item / 40%: Random psychic item
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB6

          You find the crew of the derelict ship interred within stasis pods. Unfortunately, most of the pods have failed, killing the crew inside. You recover a single survivor and bring him aboard your ship.

          1. Continue
            Random outcome (1/2 each):
            • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB6_1

              You wake the survivor. They are saddened to learn of the fate of their shipmates. With nothing else to do, they decide to join your crew.

              • Raider crew or Imperial Recruit or Imperial Scribe
              1. Continue
            • oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB6_2

              The survivor emerges from the pod, but her condition rapidly deteriorates. Soon she is rendered a gibbering abomination. She begins attacking your ship.

              • 1 Greater Corpulent boarder
              1. Continue
  2. Move on
    oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_moveOn

    You press onwards.

    1. Continue
  3. (Sensor 2) Conduct a detailed sensor survey
    oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_bt_sensor

    You perform a deep scan of the region. After some time, your sensors detect a faint signal emanating from a debris field.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_bt_sensor2

      You close in on the debris field. The faint signal grows stronger. Eventually you come across a transponder beacon attached to a cryostasis pod.

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_bt_sensor3

        Having recovered the cryostasis pod, you rouse the occupant within. With nowhere else to go, they join your crew.

        • Sector-appropriate crew (tiered) ×-1
        1. Continue

RaiderRemnantStars_bt

→ oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_bt_sensor

RaiderRemnantStars_investigateB6

→ oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_investigateB6_1

RaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionB

→ oTxtRaiderRemnantStars_spareProvisionB_1

RaiderTollPatrol

oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_intro

You are hailed by a raider ship. "Pay up if you want to make it out of here in one piece."

  1. Pay 25 scrap
    oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_pay

    You transfer some metal to the corsairs.

    • −25 ⬗ Scrap
    • Enemy becomes friendly
    1. Continue
  2. Refuse
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseA

      "I warned you..."

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseB

      You refuse to pay the toll and arm your weapons. Suddenly, an Imperial patrol vessel drops in. The corsair seizes the moment to broadcast openly, "Help! These pirates are trying to extort us!"

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseB1

          The patrol vessel turns on you. "By the Immortal Throne, we have come to purge His realm of scum like you."

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Empire ship
          After the rewards from the fight:
          oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseB1_win

          The raider ship is nowhere to be found. They must have escaped while you were occupied.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseB2

          The imperial patrol vessel seems to pay no attention and silently speeds off into the distance. The raiders, seeing no help forthcoming, quickly follow suit.

          1. Continue
  3. (Shield Charger) Intimidate the raiders
    oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_bt_shieldCharger

    You activate your shield charger system. Gauging you to be a difficult opponent, the raiders quickly change their tone. They inform you of a hidden supply cache to hasten your departure.

    • Combat ends
    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_bt_shieldCharger2

      You are able to locate the raider's hidden supply cache. You take what you find and then move on.

      • Random large reward
      1. Continue
  4. (Raider Outlaw) Negotiate a resolution
    oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_bt_raider

    A member of your crew attempts to negotiate with the raiders. Through a subtle series of codified gestures and expressions known only to those born into the raider clans, your crewmember identifies themselves as a trusted kin of the corsairs. They are able to negotiate not just an exemption from the toll, but they even earn the sympathy of the corsairs. The pirates wish you luck as you depart.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Combat ends
    1. Continue

RaiderTollPatrol_bt

→ oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_bt_raider

RaiderTollPatrol_refuseB1

→ oTxtRaiderTollPatrol_refuseB1_win

RaiderTollStandard

oTxtRaiderTollStandard_intro

A raider ship is lying in wait for you. "You will have to pay if you want safe passage here."

  1. Pay 30 scrap
    oTxtRaiderTollStandard_pay

    You pay the corsairs some metal.

    • −30 ⬗ Scrap
    • Enemy becomes friendly
    1. Continue
  2. Refuse
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTollStandard_refuseA

      "Looks like we have to do this the hard way."

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollStandard_refuseC

      The raider ship's drive thrusters sputter as it closes in to attack. It seems the corsairs are having some trouble with their ship systems.

      • Enemy: destroy a system
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollStandard_refuseB

      You move in to attack. The raider ship fires off a hasty salvo, missing wide. They decide that engaging you is not worth the trouble and flee.

      • Enemy ship warps away
      1. Continue
  3. (Weapons 4) Intimidate the corsairs
    oTxtRaiderTollStandard_bt_weapon

    You charge up your weapons. The corsairs take notice and quickly revise their bearing towards you. They eject some supplies across your bow as they make their escape in the other direction. You recover the supplies and move on.

    • Random large reward
    1. Continue
  4. (Raider Outlaw) Negotiate a resolution
    oTxtRaiderTollStandard_bt_raider

    One of your crew introduces themselves as a fellow raider to the extorting corsairs. The corsairs quickly change their tone, and pay you tribute as you pass on through.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Combat ends
    1. Continue

RaiderTollStandard_bt

→ oTxtRaiderTollStandard_bt_raider

RaiderTollTransport

oTxtRaiderTollTransport_intro

You arrive to find a raider ship accosting a transport. The transport hails you. "Help, they want to enslave my entire crew!"

  1. Assist the transport
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistA

      You move in to attack the raider ship. The raider ship pulls off from the transport to engage you.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistA_winA

        The transport seems to have fled during the engagement.

        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistA_winB

        The transport thanks you for your assistance. They send you a reward before jumping out.

        • Random large reward
        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistB

      You fire a salvo at the raider ship. The raider ship hails you. "Trying to play the hero? We shall see about that." They immediately fire upon the transport ship and blast it to pieces.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistB_win

      You salvage what you can from the wrecked transport.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC

      The raiders notice you moving in aggressively. "We have no quarrel with you. Let us do our thing and we shall split the score."

      1. Agree
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC1_agreeA

          The raider ship captures the transport's crew. They make good on their promise and shuttle over a couple of freshly-minted servo-husks.

          • Random small reward
          • Husk
          • Husk
          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC1_agreeB

          The raider ship captures the transport's crew. They promptly shoot your engines, disabling them. The raiders then jump out with their captives.

          • −1 hull HP
          • Destroy Engines
          1. Continue
      2. Refuse
        oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC2_a

        "You're a real bastard, you know that?" The raider ship turns and jumps out.

        1. Continue
          oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC2_reward

          The transport thanks you for the help. They transfer over a small reward and then jump out.

          • Random small reward
          1. Continue
  2. Let the raiders proceed
    oTxtRaiderTollTransport_proceed

    The raiders abduct the transport's crew. They then scuttle the empty ship.

    1. Attack the raiders
      oTxtRaiderTollTransport_attack

      You establish a targeting lock on the raider ship and open fire.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the rewards from the fight:
      oTxtRaiderTollTransport_attack_win

      The raiders made an attempt to destroy their human cargo, but you nevertheless discover a survivor.

      • Random prisoner crew
      1. Continue
    2. Salvage the wreckage
      oTxtRaiderTollTransport_salvage

      The raider ship departs. You move in to salvage the wrecked transport.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
  3. Ignore them
    oTxtRaiderTollTransport_ignore

    You ignore their hail and move on.

    1. Continue
  4. (Weapons 4) Intimidate the raiders
    oTxtRaiderTollTransport_bt_weapon

    You make yourself known to the raider ship as you roll your vessel to display your ship armaments. Having taken the hint, the raider ship quickly departs.

    1. Continue
      oTxtRaiderTollTransport_bt_weapon2

      The transport vessel offers you some payment for your assistance before leaving the area. You move on.

      • Random moderate reward
      1. Continue
  5. (Raider Outlaw) Assist the raiders against the transport
    oTxtRaiderTollTransport_bt_raider

    You ally with the attacking raiders against the hapless transport. The transport proves such a lucrative haul the raiders ended up dismounting one of their ship armament to make more room for slaves and merchandise. The raiders offer you their dismounted gun, as well as all the remaining loot as compensation for your part in capturing the transport's crew.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    • Random ship weapon
    1. Continue

RaiderTollTransport_assistA

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistA_winA

RaiderTollTransport_assistB

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistB_win

RaiderTollTransport_assistC1

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC1_agreeA

RaiderTollTransport_assistC2

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_assistC2_a

RaiderTollTransport_attack

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_attack_win

RaiderTollTransport_bt

→ oTxtRaiderTollTransport_bt_raider

RaiderTollWarlord

oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_intro

You encounter a raider at the jump node. They urge you to enlist their services in order to secure safe passage.

  1. Pay 15 scrap
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_payB

      "Smart move." You pay the corsairs and move on.

      • −15 ⬗ Scrap
      • Enemy becomes friendly
      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_payA

      You pay the corsairs. They send over one of their crew to accompany you on your journey.

      • Corsair, Scavenger, Infiltrator, or Gene Soldier
      • −15 ⬗ Scrap
      • Enemy becomes friendly
      1. Continue
  2. Refuse
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_refuseA

      "We warned you." The raider ship accelerates with a start and trains its weapons on you.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_refuseB

      The corsair does not attack. "Do not say we did not warn you. There is danger ahead."

      1. Continue
        oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_refuseB2

        You proceed onwards.

        • Enemy becomes friendly
        1. Continue
  3. (Weapons 5) Show you mean business
    oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_bt_weapon

    You make a point of displaying your vessel's armament for the raider commander to see. They appear impressed, and send one of their crew to assist you.

    • Gain crew: Mercenary
    • Combat ends
    1. Continue
  4. (Raider Outlaw) Negotiate a resolution
    oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_bt_raider

    Helped by one of your raider crewmembers, you persuade the raider captain to send one of their crew to help you, free of charge.

    • Raider crew
    • Combat ends
    1. Continue

RaiderTollWarlord_bt

→ oTxtRaiderTollWarlord_bt_raider

RaiderTransport

oTxtRaiderTransport_intro

Signals gathered from a nearby communications relay have revealed the existence of a large corsair convoy. The pirate vessels are ferrying an assortment of materiel, likely stolen from some unfortunate colony.

  1. Attack the convoy
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA

      You mount an assault on the convoy. Most of its ships manage to escape, but you are able to force one vessel into an engagement.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Raider ship
      After the fight:
      Random outcome (1/4 each):
      • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA1

        You recover an intact stasis pod from the aftermath. The prisoner awakens, then gladly joins your crew.

        • Customizable crew (all tiers)
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA2

        You retrieve some useful material from the aftermath of the battle.

        • Random moderate reward
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA3

        You crack open the storage vaults and discover some supplies.

        • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
        1. Continue
      • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA4

        Unfortunately, this particular transport hauler was not carrying anything of value.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB

      You open fire at the convoy.

      1. Continue
        Random outcome (1/3 each):
        • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB2

          One of the convoy escorts intercepts you. The transport vessels in the convoy take this opportunity to flee. You turn to engage the new threat.

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Raider Large ship
        • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB3

          The first target crumples, as if they had intended for it to die. Then you realize you have fallen into a trap. Explosions sound from the lower decks indicating multiple hull breaches. The intruder alarms screech noisily.

          • 2–3 breaches spawned
          • 1–2 Raider crew boarders
          1. Continue
          Fight! vs Raider ship
          After the rewards from the fight:
          oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB3_1

          The remaining corsairs have fled from the scene. You move on.

          1. Continue
        • oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB1

          To your surprise, the first shot that hits the convoy causes it to detonate in a strange, sorcerous explosion. It sets off a chain reaction of explosions which cascade across every single vessel in the convoy. Subspace energy rocks your ship, and multiple warning sirens blare as you realize you are under attack. Whatever those convoys were carrying, it could not have been good.

          • 2–3 breaches spawned
          • 2 warp breaches spawned
          • 1–2 Demonic Crew boarders
          1. Continue
  2. Ignore them
    oTxtRaiderTransport_leave

    You ignore them and continue on with your journey.

    1. Continue
oTxtRaiderTransport_intro2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Your ship emerges from subspace near a convoy of transport vessels. They appear to be corsair haulers, likely working for the great raider clans of the Protostar Wastes.

  1. Attack the convoy
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • → oTxtRaiderTransport_attackA
    • → oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB
  2. Ignore them
    → oTxtRaiderTransport_leave

RaiderTransportPair

oTxtRaiderTransportPair_intro

You come across a raider convoy. One of the vessels within strike range is carrying a container filled with ordnance. Another is transporting equipment. You will be able to engage one of the vessels before they move out of range.

  1. Attack the ordnance transport
    oTxtRaiderTransportPair_secureOrdnance1

    You set your sights on the target and open fire..

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtRaiderTransportPair_secureOrdnance2

    You recover some ordnance from the remains.

    • reward_missileAmmoMedium or reward_missileAmmoHigh
    1. Continue
  2. Attack the equipment transport
    oTxtRaiderTransportPair_secureEquipment1

    You initiate combat protocols.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Raider ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtRaiderTransportPair_secureEquipment2

    You recover some useful equipment.

    • Random equipment item
    1. Continue
  3. Ignore them
    oTxtRaiderTransportPair_ignore

    You ignore them.

    1. Continue

RaiderTransport_attackB3

→ oTxtRaiderTransport_attackB3_1

RdrNothing

oTxtRdrNothing_intro

[...]

  1. Continue

RebelConspiracy

oTxtRebelConspiracy_intro

You overhear a conversation while docked at a trading outpost. "...We will hit the Imperials so hard, they will never bother us again."

  1. Continue
    oTxtRebelConspiracy_intro2

    The man speaking then proceeds to detail their plans to bomb a nearby Imperial supply station. Supposedly the station will be undefended for 36 hours due to a hiccup in their security detail. You consider what to do with this information.

    1. Alert the authorities
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtRebelConspiracy_alertA
