You come across a subspace rupture of unprecendented magnitude. It bleeds distortion across the fabric of space-time. Within the rupture lies the promise of unseen terrors and crueler fates.

  1. Approach the rupture
  2. Ignore it

TormentSkip_fightWin

oTxtTormentSkip_fightWin_noSkip Unreachable — not referenced by any event

The thing that stood watch dies without ceremony, as if this moment had already been decided. The rupture seals shut, leaving behind echoes of protoplasmic essence.

  • [oConsumableSummonBloat ×oConsumableSummonHound

TriggerTest

oTxtTriggerTest Unreachable — not referenced by any event

TRIGGER TEST SUCCESS

  1. Continue

TutorialCombat

oTxtTutorialCombat Unreachable — not referenced by any event

The galaxy is filled with hostile threats. These servo-husks have gone rogue and are threatening to destroy your ship.

  1. Continue
    oTxtTutorialCombat2

    Fortunately their ship's weapons do not have the strength to penetrate your shields. You will show them the error of their ways.

    1. Continue

TutorialCombat2

→ oTxtTutorialCombat2

TutorialDestroyEngines

oTxtTutorialDestroyEngines Unreachable — not referenced by any event

As you prepare to initiate subspace translation, a sudden energy spike surges through your vessel, destroying your engines.

  • Destroy Engines
  1. Continue

TutorialDestroyOxygen

oTxtTutorialDestroyOxygen Unreachable — not referenced by any event

A sudden energy spike has destroyed your life support system. This could be dangerous. Without life support, the oxygen in your ship will gradually deplete and eventually suffocate your crew.

  • Destroy Oxygen
  1. Continue

TutorialEnemyCrewKilled

oTxtTutorialEnemyCrewKilled Unreachable — not referenced by any event

The enemy crew has perished. You salvage some material from the remains. You can hover over any of your salvaged items for more info.

  • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
  • Repair Drone ×2
  • Bolt Cannon
  1. Continue

TutorialEnemyDestroyed

oTxtTutorialEnemyDestroyed Unreachable — not referenced by any event

The corsair vessel breaks apart. You salvage some material from the remains. You can hover over any of your salvaged items for more info.

  • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
  • Repair Drone
  • Bolt Cannon
  1. Continue

TutorialGainLance

oTxtTutorialGainLance Unreachable — not referenced by any event

An energy lance has been installed on your ship.

  • Energy Lance ×0
  1. Continue

TutorialGainTwoCrew

oTxtTutorialGainTwoCrew Unreachable — not referenced by any event

A pair of Imperial Enforcers have joined your crew.

  • Imperial Enforcer ×0
  • Imperial Enforcer ×0
  1. Continue
    oTxtTutorialSpawnFire

    They have arrived in time to assist you with the fire that has broken out on your ship.

    1. Continue

TutorialSpawnFire

→ oTxtTutorialSpawnFire

TutorialSpawnFire2

oTxtTutorialSpawnFire2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

As you continue to your attack on the enemy vessel, you hear an explosion echo across your ship. Another fire has broken out on your ship.

  1. Continue

TutorialSpawnFireForVenting

oTxtTutorialSpawnFireForVenting Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Unfortunately another fire has broken out on your ship. This time, instead of sending crew to extinguish the fire, use your ship's door control system to open an airlock and vent out the room.

  1. Continue

UpgradeConfirm

oTxtUpgradeConfirm Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You have unconfirmed reactor upgrades.

VaultDestroyed

oTxtVaultDestroyed Unreachable — not referenced by any event

The storage vault has been destroyed.

VaultSecured

oTxtVaultSecured Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Your crew retrieves the contents of the storage vault.

  1. Continue

VaultSecuredAlliedShip

oTxtVaultSecuredAlliedShip Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You open up one of the vaults in your cargo hold.

  1. Continue

VaultSecuredCrewKill

oTxtVaultSecuredCrewKill Unreachable — not referenced by any event

With the enemy crew eliminated, you waste no time in retrieving the vaults aboard their ship.

  1. Continue

VaultSecuredPlayer

oTxtVaultSecuredPlayer Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You retrieve the contents of the storage vault.

  1. Continue

VaultSecuredProjectile

oTxtVaultSecuredProjectile Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You recover the vault and retrieve its contents.

  1. Continue

WarChampion

oTxtWarChampion_intro

You arrive and find yourself surrounded by the burnt-out skeletons of dozens of starships. Every single ship among the remains bears the markings of the Cult of Krom.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtWarChampion_investigateB

      An onslaught of subspace rifts erupts across your ship. You hear a roar over the comms. "I am the chosen of Krom!"

      • 1–2 warp breaches spawned
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
    • oTxtWarChampion_investigateA

      A lone vessel idles at the center of the conflict zone. You receive a transmission. "The shattered remains of Krom's greatest warriors lie before you. I have slain them all. Do you wish to challenge me?"

      1. Fight
        oTxtWarChampion_fight1

        "Very well. Then show me your strength."

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs War ship
        After the rewards from the fight:
        oTxtWarChampion_fight2

        You locate the Kromic champion's mangled body after the battle. He is grievously wounded, but still alive.

        1. Attempt to speak to him
          Random outcome (1/2 each):
          • oTxtWarChampion_speak

            "You have proven yourself to be a true champion of Krom. Take my blade and let it aid you in your conquests."

            • Fell Axe or Cult Blade
            1. Continue
          • oTxtWarChampion_speak2

            You attempt to speak to him, but his throat is too mangled to reply. He gurgles for a few moments, then dies.

            1. Continue
        2. (Auto-Surgeon) Reconstruct his body
          oTxtWarChampion_reconstruct

          You haul what remains of the champion to your auto-surgeon and use it to reconstruct his broken frame. Moments later, his body is restored. "You have bested me in combat. I will now pledge my allegiance to you and fight by your side. My life is yours to command."

          • Recruit enemy commander as crew
          1. Continue
      2. Decline
        oTxtWarChampion_decline

        "I see. Then take what you want and leave. I have no patience for cowards."

        1. Continue
          Random outcome (1/2 each):
          • oTxtWarChampion_declineA

            You attempt to salvage the wrecked ships but find nothing of value.

            1. Continue
          • oTxtWarChampion_declineB

            You quickly collect some scrap from the wrecks before the warrior changes his mind.

            • Random small reward
            1. Continue
  2. Move on
    oTxtWarChampion_moveOn

    You continue on with your journey.

    1. Continue
  3. (War Cultist) Salvage ship armaments
    oTxtWarChampion_bt_warCultist

    A member of your crew is familiar with the war cult starship design. They help you efficiently locate and recover an intact starship grade weapon from among the wreckage.

    • Random ship weapon
    1. Continue

WarChampion_bt

→ oTxtWarChampion_bt_warCultist

WarCultAssault

oTxtWarCultAssault_intro

As you enter the system, you receive a signal broadcast on all channels. A Kromic cultist rants and raves about the purity of warfare, calling all able souls to join them on a glorious war-quest against the Empire. The Imperials have built one of their pyre-temples on the orbit of a nearby red supergiant. The worshippers of the God-King must be broken, their spirits broken and bodies torn asunder for the glory of the god of war. Great rewards await mighty warriors!

  1. Agree to aid in the assault
    oTxtWarCultAssault_accept

    Victory or death. A glorious battle awaits. You receive coordinates to the target system.

    • Quest marker added to map: oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_intro
    1. Continue
  2. Rebuke the cultists
    oTxtWarCultAssault_decline

    You decline and decide to move on. A beastly howl rings out through the comms, then cuts off.

    1. Continue

WarCultAssaultQuest

oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_intro

Kromic vessels and an Imperial pyre-temple are silhouetted against the majesty of the red giant star. Your ship approaches as the battle is already raging. Vicious Kromic warships battle against the Imperials who desperately fight for their lives.

  1. Continue
    oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle

    Your ship soars onwards into the fray. Even from deep within your vessel you feel the resonant crackling as intense coronal plasma from the nearby star whips across your shields.

    • 2–3 fires spawned
    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle_win

    The enemy ship explodes. You plunge further into the star's burning heat as the battle rages on.

    • Crew recalled to ship
    1. Continue
      oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle_win1

      The war cultists fight even as the hulls of the closest ships begin to glow red-hot. An Imperial ship finds you and lands a surprise attack. Alarms go off: your ship has been boarded.

      • Damage to random system
      • 2–3 Imperial Recruit, Imperial Enforcer, or Imperial Marshal boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Empire ship
      After the fight:
      oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle_win2

      The last defender falls. A roar of triumph reverberates from the Kromic ships through your comms panel -- no, the sound is something more, you feel it in your bones. Primal joy spreads throughout your body. This truly was a glorious battle.

      1. Continue
        oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle_win3

        The leader of the warband contacts you. He sends rewards your way, and you are given the honour of scuttling the monastery. Your weapons swiftly destroy whatever is left, the pieces falling into the red star. The war cultists cheer again and soon depart.

        • Large amount of ⬗ Scrap
        • Gore Sledge
        • Tower of Skulls
        1. Continue

WarCultAssaultQuest_battle

→ oTxtWarCultAssaultQuest_battle_win

WarCultAttackEmpire

oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_intro

You detect an Imperial ship under attack by a war cult vessel.

  1. Attack the war cult vessel
    oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_attack

    You move to engage the cultists.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs War ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_winA

      The Imperial commander eyes you suspiciously, but nevertheless ejects a small supply crate before jumping out.

      • Random Imperial defensive item
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_winB

      The Imperial patrol vessel is nowhere to be found. It escaped during your engagement with the cultist warship.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_winC

      An Imperial reinforcement fleet arrives and begins to attack you, having mistaken you for the enemy. You are forced to flee, but not without sustaining some minor damage.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      • 1–2 breaches spawned
      1. Continue
  2. Leave the Imperials to their fate
    oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_leave

    You observe the fight from a safe distance. The war cult vessel soon obliterates the Imperial ship. It then jumps out, and you move in and recover the few valuables left among the debris.

    • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue
  3. (Hull Reaper) Attack the Imperial ship
    oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_bt_hullReaper1

    You prime your hull reaper system and engage the beleaguered Imperial ship. Your vessel's hull is regenerated as the Imperial ship crumbles beneath the assault.

    • +3–5 hull HP
    1. Continue
      oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_bt_hullreaper2

      Startled by the suddenness of your vessel's appearance, the war cult vessel withdraws. You salvage the remnants of the destroyed Imperial ship and move on.

      • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue

WarCultAttackEmpire_bt

→ oTxtWarCultAttackEmpire_bt_hullReaper1

WarCultEmpireFight

oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_intro

You witness two starships firing upon one another. One of the ships broadcasts on an open channel. "We shall cleanse the Empire of your blasphemies." The other ship broadcasts in response, "Show us your strength."

  1. Fire at the Imperial ship
    oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_fireEmpire

    You move to attack the Imperial ship.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs Empire ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_empireWinA

      After dealing with the Imperials, a cultist commander opens a tightbeam channel. "Impressive. We have seen your methods of waging war and cannot deny your martial prowess. Please accept this gift from our lord Krom. We hope it shall serve you well in the battles to come.

      • Random ship weapon
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_empireWinB

      You detect the sudden appearance of multiple subspace translations all around you. A large Kromic warfleet jumps though, and several acquire sensor locks on you. You quickly leave the area before you are overwhelmed.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
  2. Fire at the war cult ship
    oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_fireWar

    You move to attack the war cult vessel.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs War ship
    After the rewards from the fight:
    Random outcome (1/2 each):
    • oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_fireWarA

      With the cult vessel neutralized, you realize that the Imperial vessel is nowhere to be found. Your multispex detects the residual energies of subspace translation, showing that they jumped out as soon as you entered the battle. Apparently they were not as eager to fight as they suggested.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_fireWarB

      Without warning, the Imperial vessel opens fire at you. A cursory scan shows their sensor array was damaged during the fight. They must have mistaken you for their quarry.

      • Crew recalled to ship
      1. Continue
        oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_fireWarB2

        You turn your ship to engage.

        1. Continue
        Fight! vs Empire ship
  3. Avoid the situation
    oTxtWarCultEmpireFight_avoid

    You slip away and move on.

    1. Continue

WarInvadeAftermath

oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_intro

Your ship emerges outside the perimeter of a large space colony. The colony is burning. Its surface is studded with grisly totems, each bearing the icon of the war god, Krom.

  1. Look for survivors
    Random outcome (1/6 each):
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look6

      You find no survivors, but manage to locate a cache of intact ordnance.

      • Small amount of missile ammo (3–6)
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look

      You search the colony for survivors and manage to find a functioning servo-husk.

      • Servo-husk or Combat Husk
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look2

      You search the colony for survivors. Unfortunately it soon becomes clear that not a single life was spared.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look3

      You begin to look for survivors and are immediately ambushed by a cult starship. They have managed to board your vessel.

      • 1–2 Berserker or Warseer boarders
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look5

      You scan the colony. No life signs are detected. You salvage what you can from a nearby supply station, then continue on with your journey.

      • Random small reward
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_look4

      You detect a lone lifeboat drifting in the distance. Inside is an Imperial soldier. "I was abandoned by my commander during the attack. You seem more trustworthy. Let me join your crew."

      • Imperial Recruit or Imperial Enforcer
      1. Continue
  2. Avoid it and move on
    oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_avoid

    You decide not to get involved.

    1. Continue
  3. (Blood Psyker) Have your psyker reveal nearby life forces
    oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_bloodPsyker

    Your psyker conducts a blood ritual that reveals all life forces present in the region. The ritual leads you to a small annex near the outskirts of the colony. You discover a frightened scholar hiding within. The scholar decides to join your crew.

    • Imperial Scribe
    1. Continue
  4. (War Cultist) Investigate war cult wreckage
    oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_bt_warCultist

    You happen upon a disabled vessel knocked out early in the attack. A careful scan locates a faint life sign still aboard. A cultist crewmember explains that the war cult leaves the defeated for dead, but nevertheless agrees to save the lone survivor. After a short standoff, they manage to convince the surviving war cultist to join your crew.

    • War Cult crew
    1. Continue

WarInvadeAftermath_bt

→ oTxtWarInvadeAftermath_bt_warCultist

WarLaboratory

oTxtWarLaboratory_intro

Ahead of you is a small outpost adorned with skulls and cult markings. Its configuration suggests that is some sort of laboratory.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/4 each):
    • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateA

      You enter the laboratory and find a cornucopia of strange materials and occult reagents. Some of them may prove useful.

      • Random War Cult consumable
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateB

      You enter the laboratory. Most of the remnants are too old and decayed to be of any use, however you do manage to recover a small amount of scrap.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateC

      You enter the laboratory and are immediately greeted by a pair of cultists. The cultists quickly key in some emergency code before attacking you and boarding your ship.

      • 2 Berserker or Warseer boarders
      1. Continue
      After the boarders are defeated:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateC_1

        The laboratory self-destructs. The cultists clearly wanted to prevent you from obtaining whatever it was they were working on. Despite this, you manage to recover an unusual item from one of the bodies.

        • Doom Reagents ×choose(1, 2)
        1. Continue
      • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateC_2

        The laboratory self-destructs and leaves nothing behind.

        1. Continue
    • oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateD1

      As soon as you near the laboratory, a cult warship undocks from behind and opens fire on the installation. The laboratory explodes. "My work is complete. Observe the fruits of my labor."

      1. Continue
        oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateD2

        The enemy warship emits streams of dark energy, and you soon find yourself under attack.

        • 1–3 Hound or Skeleton boarders
        1. Continue
  2. Avoid it and move on
    oTxtWarLaboratory_avoid

    You decide to avoid it and move on.

    1. Continue
  3. (War Cultist) Investigate war cult wreckage
    oTxtWarLaboratory_bt_warCultist

    A cultist among your crew is familiar with the labyrinthine interior layout of these research installations. You are able to recover some performance enhancing technology from within the laboratory.

    • Psyk-Chem Injectors or Aberrant Conduit
    1. Continue

WarLaboratory_bt

→ oTxtWarLaboratory_bt_warCultist

WarLaboratory_investigateC

→ oTxtWarLaboratory_investigateC_1

WarNothing

oTxtWarNothing_intro

[...]

  1. Continue

WarScreaming

oTxtWarScreaming_intro

A lone Kromic warship drifts through the void. The ship's hull is worn but undamaged. Its weapons and thrusters are unpowered and your multispex shows that the generator is still running and that there is a breathable atmosphere within the ship. Suddenly, your comms system begins to broadcast blood-curdling screams.

  1. Enter the ship
    oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA

    You enter the ship and are immediately assailed by the stench of rot and iron. The walls are painted with splatters of blood, the compartments filled with mounds of mutilated corpses. You note that they have something carved into their skin. Two words, written in the profane script used by Kromic priests: "Sacrifice. Glory."

    1. Continue
      oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA1

      Suddenly, you hear a loud animalistic bellow from the depths of the ship, and even the air of the ship trembles, suffused by unholy energies.

      1. Follow the strange noise
        oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor

        You follow the fury-suffused screams and discover its source in a small compartment. A badly injured Kromic berserker lays atop a mound of corpses. Surrounding him are ship hands, clearly excluded from whatever foul ritual took place back here. You might learn something interesting from the berserker, or you could put the wretched cultist and his cohort out of their misery.

        1. Speak with the cultist
          Random outcome (1/3 each):
          • oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor2

            You speak with the berserker, but are soon interrupted by an alert on your ship. An ambush! An enemy vessel appears on your multispex and your ship is boarded by hostiles.

            • 3–4 Berserker or Conqueror boarders
            1. Continue
            Fight! vs War ship
            After the rewards from the fight:
            oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_rescue2_win

            The last cultist lies defeated.

            • Random War Cult equipment
            1. Continue
          • oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor3

            The berserker speaks with you but you soon realize it is a ploy. The cultists ambush you and their leader manages to sabotage your ship. An enemy vessel engages you as your ship is boarded by hostiles.

            • Damage to random system
            • 3–4 Berserker or Conqueror boarders
            1. Continue
            Fight! vs War ship
            After the rewards from the fight:
            oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor3_win

            The last war cultist is dead.

            • Random War Cult equipment
            1. Continue
          • oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor1

            You address the cultist, and through gritted teeth he tells you about the ritual that took place here. Thousands of warriors were locked into this ship, and only seven taken out. The seven would be blessed by Krom himself. Something with the ritual went wrong, and he was left alive.

            1. Continue
              oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor1_1

              He pleads with you to allow him to join your crew; a quiet death would have his soul discarded by the War God.

              1. Continue
                oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor1_a

                You rescue him and the other ship hands, allowing them to join your crew.

                • Berserker or Conqueror
                • Quest marker added to map: oTxtWarScreamingQuest_intro
                1. Continue
        2. Kill the survivors and scavenge the ship
          Random outcome (1/2 each):
          • oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_kill

            You kill the survivors and loot their corpses.

            • 1 random equipment item
            1. Continue
          • oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_kill2

            You kill the survivors and loot their corpses. Suddenly, your ship's warning klaxons come to life! One of the survivors has survived and has boarded your ship.

            • 1 Conqueror or Chaos Knight or Conqueror boarder
            1. Continue
            After the boarders are defeated:
            oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_kill2_win

            The last Kromic warrior is dead. You take their equipment and leave.

            • 1 random equipment item
            1. Continue
        3. Leave the profane ship.
          oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_moveOn

          You leave the cursed vessel.

          1. Continue
      2. Leave the Kromic ship
        oTxtWarScreaming_moveOn

        You move on.

        1. Continue
  2. Ignore the screaming and salvage the ship
    oTxtWarScreaming_salvage

    You ignore the screaming and scavenge the ship. You find some scrap.

    • Moderate amount of ⬗ Scrap
    1. Continue
  3. Move on
    → oTxtWarScreaming_moveOn
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB Unreachable — not referenced by any event

As you prepare your boarding party for exploration, a hostile ship appears from the other side of the wreck. It trains its weapons on you.

  1. Continue
Fight! vs War ship
After the rewards from the fight:
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_survivor

You follow the echoing bellows and come to a small compartment already flanked by your scouts. A half-dead Kromic warrior lays atop a carpet of bodies, clutching a jagged sword. Hiding in the room are other ship workers, their skin unmarred and clearly excluded from the foul ritual that took place here. The warrior wishes to speak to you. You might learn something useful, or you could put the entire compartment to the blade.

  1. Speak with the cultist
    oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_survivor1

    You address the cultist. He speaks with a hoarse tone and describes a horrific ritual where thousands of warriors were inscribed with Kromic runes and commanded to fight one another to the death. Seven would survive, and those would be Krom's chosen. The ritual failed somehow, and he was left alive. He begs you to take him onto your ship. He must die in honourable combat, or else his god will discard his soul once he dies.

    1. Take him
      oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_survivor2

      You rescue him and the other ship hands, allowing them to join your crew.

      • Berserker or Conqueror
      • Quest marker added to map: oTxtWarScreamingQuest_intro
      1. Continue
    2. Leave him and move on
      oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_survivor3

      You leave him and collect what you can from this ship before departing.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You enter the ship and witness the site of a gruesome massacre. A miasma of rot and blood suffuses the ship's atmosphere. The walls are splattered with blood, and every hallway and room is filled with butchered corpses. You notice that hateful symbols have been carved into their skin. Two words, written in the script used by Kromic priests: "Sacrifice. Glory." Suddenly one of your scouts contacts you. They've found someone, and they're screaming. You strain your ears, and can hear it too.

  1. Follow the strange noise
  2. Kill the survivors and scavenge the ship

WarScreamingQuest

oTxtWarScreamingQuest_intro

You arrive at the location given to you by the survivors of the Kromic ship you rescued earlier. Nestled within a field of asteroids you see a strange, flat surface. As you approach, you realize it is a vast arena, a colosseum carved into the asteroid itself. The arena looks damaged by ship weapons and there are no life signs detected by your systems.

  1. Enter the arena
    oTxtWarScreamingQuest_investigate

    Your scouts investigate the arena thoroughly. The structure is at least a thousand years old. Underneath it lies a small facility. Reinforced walls and doors reveal that this must have been some kind of a storage crypt. You are certain that breaking into the storage crypt will alert someone.

    1. Breach the storage crypt
      oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA

      You breach the crypt door and see a solitary figure standing at the center. Tall, imposing, wearing bolted on mechanical armour, wielding an enormous two-handed sword. A chaos knight. He looks directly at you, and points his sword in your direction.

      1. Continue
        oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA1

        The entire arena quakes. Hidden gates open, and two Kromic warships take flight, immediately attacking you. The chaos knight begins to run towards you and manages to board your ship. You take what you can, and barely make it back before the first attack comes.

        • Large amount of ⬗ Scrap
        • Random ship weapon
        • 1 Chaos Knight boarder
        1. Continue
        Fight! vs War ship
        After the fight:
        oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA_victory

        The first breaks has been destroyed. You immediately prepare to face the onslaught of the second cultist vessel.

        • Crew recalled to ship
        1. Continue
          oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA_victory1

          The second ship enters combat.

          1. Continue
          Fight! vs War ship
          After the fight:
          oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA_victory2

          The second ship has been destroyed.

          1. Continue
            oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA_victory3

            You salvage what you can from all the wreckage, then prepare to move onwards.

            • Random small reward
            1. Continue
    2. Bombard the station and scavenge the remains
      oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultC

      A barrage from your weapons demolishes the entire arena. Your crew manage to scavenge some scrap. As you destroy the base, a war cult assault ship emerges from a hidden hangar and turns to attack.

      • Random moderate reward
      • Random War Cult equipment
      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
  2. Leave
    oTxtWarScreamingQuest_leave

    You leave the system.

    1. Continue

WarScreamingQuest_vaultA

→ oTxtWarScreamingQuest_vaultA_victory

WarScreaming_investigateA

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_kill
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_moveOn2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

Something feels wrong. You depart and leave the site of the Kromic ritual.

  1. Continue

WarScreaming_investigateA_kill2

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_kill2_win

WarScreaming_investigateA_rescue2

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_rescue2_win

WarScreaming_investigateA_survivor1

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor1_1

WarScreaming_investigateA_survivor3

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateA_survivor3_win

WarScreaming_investigateB1

oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_kill Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You kill the cultists and loot their corpses.

  • 1 random equipment item
  1. Continue
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB1_kill2 Unreachable — not referenced by any event

You kill the Kromics and loot their corpses. Suddenly, your ship's alarms come to life! Someone survived. They have boarded your ship.

  • 1 Herald of Ruin or Chaos Knight boarder
  1. Continue
After the boarders are defeated:
oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB_kill2_win

The warrior is dead. You loot his corpse and exit the system.

  • 1 random equipment item
  1. Continue

WarScreaming_investigateB_kill2

→ oTxtWarScreaming_investigateB_kill2_win

WarSkullMass

oTxtWarSkullMass_intro

You drop back into realspace amidst the scorched remains of a massive space battle. Erected near the center is a vast agglomeration of human skulls.

  1. Investigate
    Random outcome (1/5 each):
    • oTxtWarSkullMass_moveOn

      You decide to press on.

      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarSkullMass_investigateC

      Within seconds of approaching the skull mass, you are ambushed by a cult warship.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs Cult ship
    • oTxtWarSkullMass_investigateA

      You cruise past the skull mass, transfixed by its grim majesty. Nearby you discover a few storage vaults containing some unusual materials.

      • Random War Cult consumable
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarSkullMass_investigateB

      You investigate the skull mass and notice it is hollow. Suspended within is an unusual construction resembling the gladiatorial fighting pits of ancient myth. A crude weapon rests near the entrance.

      • random Item (WARWEAPONS)
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarSkullMass_investigateD

      A faint distress signal appears on your multispex. You approach its source. Your view feed flickers to life, displaying a woman in mining gear. She is covered in blood. "Help! I have been stranded here for hours."

      1. Help her
        Random outcome (1/2 each):
        • oTxtWarSkullMass_help2

          You bring the woman aboard. Suddenly her eyes turn black. Vicious fangs sprout from mouth and she crouches down on all fours. She lunges forward to attack.

          • 1 Hound boarder
          1. Continue
        • oTxtWarSkullMass_help1

          You bring her aboard. She is grateful. "Here, I found this on one of the cultists, after they all slaughtered each other. Some sort of mad ritual..." You accept her offering and agree to take her to the nearest outpost.

          • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
          1. Continue
      2. Refuse
        oTxtWarSkullMass_refuse

        You decide not to risk it.

        1. Continue
  2. Move on

WarSurpriseAttack

oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_intro

You briefly detect a Kromic vessel on your sensors without it detecting you in return. The violent ionic pulses of the nearby star have masked your presence. This may be a good opportunity to gain the upper hand.

  1. Pursue
    Random outcome (1/3 each):
    • oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_AttackA

      You close in on the Kromic warship. Your weapons are already charged by the time you arrive.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
    • oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_AttackC

      You close in on the Kromic warship. Unfortunately, your approach is detected, and the cultists quickly turn to engage.

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
    • oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_AttackB

      You attempt pursuit. Unfortunately, you fail to regain sensor contact with the cultist warship, and they manage to escape.

      1. Continue
  2. Ignore
    oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_leave

    You decide not to risk it and slip away.

    1. Continue
  3. (Improved Sensors) Manually tune your sensors to track the enemy
    oTxtWarSurpriseAttack_AttackBlue

    You are able to make full use of your improved sensor suite to locate the Kromic warship undetected. The cultist vessel is caught completely by surprise.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs War ship

WarTransportPair

oTxtWarTransportPair_intro

You encounter a war cult convoy transporting wargear towards a nearby battlezone. The first ship is carrying armor while the other one is carrying weapons. You have the opportunity to attack one of the ships.

  1. Attack the armor transport
    oTxtWarTransportPair_secureArmor1

    You maneuver into attack range.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs War ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtWarTransportPair_secureArmor2

    You recover a set of intact armor from the remains.

    • Random armor item
    1. Continue
  2. Attack the weapons transport
    oTxtWarTransportPair_secureWeapons1

    You prepare to fight.

    1. Continue
    Fight! vs War ship
    After the fight:
    oTxtWarTransportPair_secureWeapons2

    You recover several pieces of still-functioning wargear from the remains.

    • Random weapon item
    1. Continue
  3. Move on
    oTxtWarTransportPair_ignore

    You move on.

    1. Continue

WarWeaponsFacility

oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_intro

Your ship translates back into realspace. In front of you is a weapons manufacturing facility left behind by a Kromic warfleet.

  1. Search the facility
    Random outcome (1/6 each):
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchC

      You search the facility and find a cache of ordnance.

      • Moderate amount of missile ammo (5–8)
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchB

      You search the facility and manage to find a functioning armament.

      • Random ship weapon
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchF

      You search the facility and find a set of armor. It is in good condition.

      • Random armor item
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchE

      You begin to search the facility and are immediately attacked by a group of cultists.

      • 2–3 Berserker or Warseer boarders
      1. Continue
      After the boarders are defeated:
      oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchE_1

      You discover a number of personal valuables.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchA

      You enter the facility. Most of the remnants are too old and decayed to be of any use, however you do manage to recover a small amount of scrap.

      • Small amount of ⬗ Scrap
      1. Continue
    • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchD

      Just as you near the facility, a ship lifts up from one of the docks. Your viewfeed lights up, displaying an artificer of the war cults. "I have been waiting you."

      1. Continue
      Fight! vs War ship
      After the boarders are defeated:
      Random outcome (1/2 each):
      • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchD_1

        You return to the facility to search for supplies, but find nothing of worth.

        1. Continue
      • oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchD_2

        You return to the facility and discover a freshly-manufactured armament near the docks. The slain artificer must have been working on it.

        • Random ship weapon
        1. Continue
  2. Ignore it
    oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_ignore

    You ignore the facility and move on.

    1. Continue
  3. (Ashen Priest) Send a specialist to inspect it
    oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_bt_artificer

    You dispatch your cultist crewmember to search the weapons manufacturing facility. They are able to invoke the initialization rituals for the production mechanisms, which haltingly manages to finish the production of a piece of starship armament before grinding to a final halt. You retrieve the weaponry and move on.

    • Random ship weapon
    1. Continue

WarWeaponsFacility_bt

→ oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_bt_artificer

→ oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchD_1

→ oTxtWarWeaponsFacility_searchE_1
